### Template: Dj Events Kinematics
_File: `templates/fa/dj-events-kinematics.calqulus.yaml`_

```yaml
############
## EVENTS ##
############

- event: BOF
  steps:
    - import: [0]

- event: EOF
  steps:
    - subtract: [$length, 1]

# Bilateral and left ---

# Takeoff
- event: TakeOff_L_kinematics
  where:
    name: DJ_[LB]*
  set: left
  steps:
    - max: PelvisCGPos_vel.z
      frames: true
    - add: [$prev, 3]

- event: TakeOff_L_prio2
  where:
    name: DJ_[LB]*
  set: left
  steps:
    - if: exists(TakeOff_L_ML)
      then: TakeOff_L_ML
      else: TakeOff_L_kinematics

- event: TakeOff_L_prio
  where:
    name: DJ_[LB]*
  set: left
  steps:
    - if: exists(LOFF_force)
      then: LOFF_force@1
      else: TakeOff_L_prio2

- event: TakeOff_L
  where:
    name: DJ_[LB]*
  set: left
  steps:
    - if: exists(TakeOff_L_prio)
      then: TakeOff_L_prio
      else: TakeOff_L_kinematics

# TouchDown
- event: TouchDown_L_kinematics
  where:
    name: DJ_[LB]*
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [PelvisCGPos_vel.z,BOF, TakeOff_L]
    - min:
      frames: true
    - subtract: [$prev, 4]
    # Ensure that the frame is not negative
    - concatenate: [$prev, 0]
    - max: $prev

- event: TouchDown_L_kinetics
  where:
    name: DJ_[LB]*
  set: left
  steps:
    - if: exists(LON_force)
      then: LON_force@1
      else: TouchDown_L_kinematics

- event: TouchDown_L_prio2
  where:
    name: DJ_[LB]*
  set: left
  steps:
    - if: exists(UltimateTakeOff_L_ML)
      then: UltimateTakeOff_L_ML
      else: TouchDown_L_kinematics

- event: TouchDown_L_prio
  where:
    name: DJ_[LB]*
  set: left
  steps:
    - if: exists(LON_force)
      then: TouchDown_L_kinetics
      else: TouchDown_L_prio2

- event: TouchDown_L
  where:
    name: DJ_[LB]*
  set: left
  steps:
    - if: exists(TouchDown_L_prio)
      then: TouchDown_L_prio
      else: TouchDown_L_kinematics

# Landing
- event: Landing_L_kinematics
  where:
    name: DJ_[LB]*
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [PelvisCGPos_vel.z, TakeOff_L, EOF]
    - min:
      frames: true
    - subtract: [$prev, 4]

- event: Landing_L_kinetics
  where:
    name: DJ_[LB]*
  set: left
  steps:
    - if: exists(LON_force)
      then: LON_force@2
      else: Landing_L_kinematics

- event: Landing_L_prio2
  where:
    name: DJ_[LB]*
  set: left
  steps:
    - if: exists(Landing_L_ML)
      then: Landing_L_ML
      else: Landing_L_kinematics

- event: Landing_L_prio
  where:
    name: DJ_[LB]*
  set: left
  steps:
    - if: exists(LON_force)
      then: Landing_L_kinetics
      else: Landing_L_prio2

- event: Landing_L
  where:
    name: DJ_[LB]*
  set: left
  steps:
    - if: exists(Landing_L_prio)
      then: Landing_L_prio
      else: Landing_L_kinematics

- event: TakeOff
  where:
    name: DJ_[LB]*
  steps:
    - import: TakeOff_L

- event: TouchDown
  where:
    name: DJ_[LB]*
  steps:
    - import: TouchDown_L

- event: Landing
  where:
    name: DJ_[LB]*
  steps:
    - import: Landing_L

# Following events are needed for compatibility with force data event detection
- event: LON
  where:
    name: DJ_[LB]*
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: TouchDown_L

- event: LOFF
  where:
    name: DJ_[LB]*
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: TakeOff_L

- event: LON
  where:
    name: DJ_[LB]*
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Landing_L

# Bilateral and right ---

# TakeOff
- event: TakeOff_R_kinematics
  where:
    name: DJ_[RB]*
  set: right
  steps:
    - max: PelvisCGPos_vel.z
      frames: true
    - add: [$prev, 3]

- event: TakeOff_R_prio2
  where:
    name: DJ_[RB]*
  set: right
  steps:
    - if: exists(TakeOff_R_ML)
      then: TakeOff_R_ML
      else: TakeOff_R_kinematics

- event: TakeOff_R_prio
  where:
    name: DJ_[RB]*
  set: right
  steps:
    - if: exists(ROFF_force)
      then: ROFF_force@1
      else: TakeOff_R_prio2

- event: TakeOff_R
  where:
    name: DJ_[RB]*
  set: right
  steps:
    - if: exists(TakeOff_R_prio)
      then: TakeOff_R_prio
      else: TakeOff_R_kinematics

# TouchDown
- event: TouchDown_R_kinematics
  where:
    name: DJ_[RB]*
  set: right
  steps:
    - eventMask: [PelvisCGPos_vel.z, BOF, TakeOff_R]
    - min:
      frames: true
    - subtract: [$prev, 4]
    # Ensure that the frame is not negative
    - concatenate: [$prev, 0]
    - max: $prev

- event: TouchDown_R_kinetics
  where:
    name: DJ_[RB]*
  set: right
  steps:
    - if: exists(RON_force)
      then: RON_force@1
      else: TouchDown_R_kinematics

- event: TouchDown_R_prio2
  where:
    name: DJ_[RB]*
  set: right
  steps:
    - if: exists(UltimateTakeOff_R_ML)
      then: UltimateTakeOff_R_ML
      else: TouchDown_R_kinematics

- event: TouchDown_R_prio
  where:
    name: DJ_[RB]*
  set: right
  steps:
    - if: exists(RON_force)
      then: TouchDown_R_kinetics
      else: TouchDown_R_prio2

- event: TouchDown_R
  where:
    name: DJ_[RB]*
  set: right
  steps:
    - if: exists(TouchDown_R_prio)
      then: TouchDown_R_prio
      else: TouchDown_R_kinematics

# Landing
- event: Landing_R_kinematics
  where:
    name: DJ_[RB]*
  set: right
  steps:
    - eventMask: [PelvisCGPos_vel.z,TakeOff_R, EOF]
    - min:
      frames: true
    - subtract: [$prev, 4]

- event: Landing_R_kinetics
  where:
    name: DJ_[RB]*
  set: right
  steps:
    - if: exists(RON_force)
      then: RON_force@2
      else: Landing_R_kinematics

- event: Landing_R_prio2
  where:
    name: DJ_[RB]*
  set: right
  steps:
    - if: exists(Landing_R_ML)
      then: Landing_R_ML
      else: Landing_R_kinematics

- event: Landing_R_prio
  where:
    name: DJ_[RB]*
  set: right
  steps:
    - if: exists(RON_force)
      then: Landing_R_kinetics
      else: Landing_R_prio2

- event: Landing_R
  where:
    name: DJ_[RB]*
  set: right
  steps:
    - if: exists(Landing_R_prio)
      then: Landing_R_prio
      else: Landing_R_kinematics

- event: TakeOff
  where:
    name: DJ_[RB]*
  steps:
    - import: TakeOff_R

- event: TouchDown
  where:
    name: DJ_[RB]*
  steps:
    - import: TouchDown_R

- event: Landing
  where:
    name: DJ_[RB]*
  steps:
    - import: Landing_R

- event: TakeOff_zero # used for jump height
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
    force: both
  steps:
    - threshold: Total GRF.z
      value: 0.01
      direction: down
    - eventMask: [$prev, TouchDown, Landing]
      keep: -1

- event: TakeOff_zero # used for jump height
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
    force: left
  steps:
    - threshold: Left GRF.z
      value: 0.01
      direction: down
    - eventMask: [$prev, TouchDown_L, Landing_L]
      keep: -1

- event: TakeOff_zero # used for jump height
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
    force: right
  steps:
    - threshold: Right GRF.z
      value: 0.01
      direction: down
    - eventMask: [$prev, TouchDown_R, Landing_R]
      keep: -1

# Following events are needed for compatibility with force data event detection
- event: RON
  where:
    name: DJ_[RB]*
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: TouchDown_R

- event: ROFF
  where:
    name: DJ_[RB]*
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: TakeOff_R

- event: RON
  where:
    name: DJ_[RB]*
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: Landing_R

- event: Pelvis_lowest
  steps:
    - import: Hips_model.z
    - eventMask: [$prev, TouchDown, TakeOff]
    - min:
      frames: true

- event: COM_MIN # we do not have body COM so we use pelvis COM instead
  steps:
    - import: Hips_model.z
    - eventMask: [$prev, TouchDown, TakeOff]
    - min:
      frames: true

# Landing end 
# Place Landing_end at EOF if Landing_end cannot be created because there is no descending zero crossing of PelvisCGPos_vel after landing.
# - event: Landing_end_temp
#   steps:
#     - threshold: PelvisCGPos_vel.z
#       value: 0
#       direction: down
#     - eventMask: [$prev, Landing, EOF]
#       keep: 1

# - event: EOF-1
#   steps:
#     - import: EOF
#       frames: true
#     - subtract: [$length,2]

- event: Landing_end
  steps:
    - threshold: PelvisCGPos_vel.z
      value: 0
      direction: down
    - eventMask: [$prev, Landing, EOF]
      keep: 1
      export: Landing_end_temp

    - subtract: [$length,2]
      export: EOF-1

    - if: Landing_end_temp
      then: Landing_end_temp
      else: EOF-1

- event: Eccentric_end
  steps:
    - threshold: PelvisCGPos_vel.z
      value: 0
      direction: up
    - eventMask: [$prev, TouchDown, TakeOff]

- event: TouchDown_100ms
  steps:
    - multiply: [0.1, $framerate]
      output: myShift
    - add: [TouchDown, myShift]

# unified event names for web
- event: LeftPlotStart
  where:
    name: DJ_[LB]*
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: TouchDown_L

- event: RightPlotStart
  where:
    name: DJ_[RB]*
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: TouchDown_R

- event: LeftPlotEnd
  where:
    name: DJ_[LB]*
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: TakeOff_L

- event: RightPlotEnd
  where:
    name: DJ_[RB]*
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: TakeOff_R
```

---

### Template: Dj
_File: `templates/fa/dj.calqulus.yaml`_

```yaml

############
## SPACES ##
############

- space: VirtualLab
  alignWithSegment:
    segment: Hips_model

############
## EVENTS ##
############

- template: /templates/events-kinetics.calqulus.yaml
  where:
    force: any

- template: dj-events-kinematics.calqulus.yaml

############
## SERIES ##
############

- template: /templates/timeseries.calqulus.yaml

#############
## Metrics ##
#############

# Contact time
- parameter: ContactTime_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [TouchDown,TakeOff]

- parameter: ContactTime_DVJ_L
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [TouchDown,TakeOff]

- parameter: ContactTime_DVJ_R
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [TouchDown,TakeOff]

# Flight Time
- parameter: FlightTime_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [TakeOff,Landing]

- parameter: FlightTime_DVJ_L
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [TakeOff,Landing]

- parameter: FlightTime_DVJ_R
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [TakeOff,Landing]

# Eccentric time
- parameter: EccentricTime_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [TouchDown,COM_MIN]

- parameter: EccentricTime_DVJ_L
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [TouchDown,COM_MIN]

- parameter: EccentricTime_DVJ_R
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [TouchDown,COM_MIN]

# Concentric time
- parameter: ConcentricTime_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [COM_MIN,TakeOff]

- parameter: ConcentricTime_DVJ_L
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [COM_MIN,TakeOff]

- parameter: ConcentricTime_DVJ_R
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [COM_MIN,TakeOff]

# Flight time to Contraction time ratio
- parameter: Flight_Contraction_time_ratio_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
  steps:
    - divide: [FlightTime_DVJ_B,ConcentricTime_DVJ_B]

- parameter: Flight_Contraction_time_ratio_DVJ_L
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
  steps:
    - divide: [FlightTime_DVJ_L,ConcentricTime_DVJ_L]

- parameter: Flight_Contraction_time_ratio_DVJ_R
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
  steps:
    - divide: [FlightTime_DVJ_R,ConcentricTime_DVJ_R]

# COM @TakeOff, max, min
# We use Pelvis COM for now
- parameter: COM_Z_TO_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
  steps:
    - import: Hips_model@TakeOff
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: COM_Z_TO_DVJ_L
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
  steps:
    - import: Hips_model@TakeOff
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: COM_Z_TO_DVJ_R
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
  steps:
    - import: Hips_model@TakeOff
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: CenterOfMass_MAX_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
  steps:
    - import: Hips_model
    - eventMask: [$prev,TakeOff,TouchDown]
    - max:
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: CenterOfMass_MAX_DVJ_L
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
  steps:
    - import: Hips_model
    - eventMask: [$prev,TakeOff,TouchDown]
    - max:
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: CenterOfMass_MAX_DVJ_R
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
  steps:
    - import: Hips_model
    - eventMask: [$prev,TakeOff,TouchDown]
    - max:
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: CenterOfMass_MIN_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
  steps:
    - min: Hips_model.z
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: CenterOfMass_MIN_DVJ_L
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
  steps:
    - min: Hips_model.z
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: CenterOfMass_MIN_DVJ_R
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
  steps:
    - min: Hips_model.z
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: CenterOfMass@Landing_end
  steps:
    - import: Hips_model@Landing_end
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

#debugging signal, can be removed
- parameter: Pelvis_COM
  steps:
    - import: Hips_model
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

# Jump height calculated from pelvis height
# other options ('takeoff_velocity', 'flight_time', 'static_trial') are not available, yet

# Pelvis height
- parameter: COM_displacement_MEAN_max_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
  steps:
    - import: Hips_model.z@TakeOff => PelvisCGPos@TakeOff
    - eventMask: [Hips_model.z,TakeOff,Landing]
    - max: $prev
    - subtract: [$prev,$prev(3)]
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: COM_displacement_MEAN_max_DVJ_L
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
  steps:
    - import: Hips_model.z@TakeOff => PelvisCGPos@TakeOff
    - eventMask: [Hips_model.z,TakeOff,Landing]
    - max: $prev
    - subtract: [$prev,$prev(3)]
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: COM_displacement_MEAN_max_DVJ_R
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
  steps:
    - import: Hips_model.z@TakeOff => PelvisCGPos@TakeOff
    - eventMask: [Hips_model.z,TakeOff,Landing]
    - max: $prev
    - subtract: [$prev,$prev(3)]
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

# Static trial
- parameter: COM_displacement_MEAN_max_static_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
  steps:
    - segment: Hips_model.z
    - max:
      output: hipMax
    - segment: Hips_model?name=Static* => hipsStatic
    - mean: hipsStatic
    - subtract: [hipMax, $prev.z]
    - convert: $prev
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: COM_displacement_MEAN_max_static_DVJ_L
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
  steps:
    - segment: Hips_model.z
    - max:
      output: hipMax
    - segment: Hips_model?name=Static* => hipsStatic
    - mean: hipsStatic
    - subtract: [hipMax, $prev.z]
    - convert: $prev
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: COM_displacement_MEAN_max_static_DVJ_R
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
  steps:
    - segment: Hips_model.z
    - max:
      output: hipMax
    - segment: Hips_model?name=Static* => hipsStatic
    - mean: hipsStatic
    - subtract: [hipMax, $prev.z]
    - convert: $prev
      from: mm
      to: m

# Takeoff velocity (vel@takeoff^2 /2g)
- parameter: COM_displacement_MEAN_max_takeoff_vel_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
  steps:
    - import: PelvisCGPos_vel.z@TakeOff
    - power:
    - divide: [$prev, 19.62] #(2 * 9.81)

- parameter: COM_displacement_MEAN_max_takeoff_vel_DVJ_L
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
  steps:
    - import: PelvisCGPos_vel.z@TakeOff
    - power:
    - divide: [$prev, 19.62] #(2 * 9.81)

- parameter: COM_displacement_MEAN_max_takeoff_vel_DVJ_R
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
  steps:
    - import: PelvisCGPos_vel.z@TakeOff
    - power:
    - divide: [$prev, 19.62] #(2 * 9.81)

# Impulse (vel = impulse/m, h = vel@takeoff^2 /2g)
- parameter: COM_displacement_MEAN_max_impulse_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
    force: both
  steps:
    - multiply: [$bodyMass, 9.81]
    - multiply: [Total GRF, $prev]
    - subtract: [$prev, $prev(2)]
    - eventMask: [$prev.z, pelvis_lowest, TakeOff_zero]
      replacement: 
    - integral:
      scalar: true
    - divide: [$prev, $bodyMass] #this is takeoff velocity
    - power:
    - divide: [$prev, 19.62] #(2 * 9.81)

- parameter: COM_displacement_MEAN_max_impulse_DVJ_L
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
    force: left
  steps:
    - multiply: [$bodyMass, 9.81]
    - multiply: [Left GRF, $prev]
    - subtract: [$prev, $prev(2)]
    - eventMask: [$prev.z, pelvis_lowest, TakeOff_zero]
      replacement:
    - integral:
      scalar: true
    - divide: [$prev, $bodyMass] #this is takeoff velocity
    - power:
    - divide: [$prev, 19.62] #(2 * 9.81)

- parameter: COM_displacement_MEAN_max_impulse_DVJ_R
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
    force: right
  steps:
    - multiply: [$bodyMass, 9.81]
    - multiply: [Right GRF, $prev]
    - subtract: [$prev, $prev(2)]
    - eventMask: [$prev.z, pelvis_lowest, TakeOff_zero]
      replacement:
    - integral:
      scalar: true
    - divide: [$prev, $bodyMass] #this is takeoff velocity
    - power:
    - divide: [$prev, 19.62] #(2 * 9.81)

- parameter: COM_displacement_MEAN_min_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
  steps:
    - subtract: [CenterOfMass\@Landing_end.z, CenterOfMass_MIN_DVJ_B]

- parameter: COM_displacement_MEAN_min_DVJ_L
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
  steps:
    - subtract: [CenterOfMass\@Landing_end.z, CenterOfMass_MIN_DVJ_L]

- parameter: COM_displacement_MEAN_min_DVJ_R
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
  steps:
    - subtract: [CenterOfMass\@Landing_end.z, CenterOfMass_MIN_DVJ_R]


#COM peak eccentric velocity
- parameter: PelvisCGPos_vel_min_eccentric_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
  steps:
    - min: PelvisCGPos_vel
    - eventMask: [$prev,TouchDown,COM_MIN]

- parameter: PelvisCGPos_vel_min_eccentric_DVJ_L
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
  steps:
    - min: PelvisCGPos_vel
    - eventMask: [$prev,TouchDown,COM_MIN]

- parameter: PelvisCGPos_vel_min_eccentric_DVJ_R
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
  steps:
    - min: PelvisCGPos_vel
    - eventMask: [$prev,TouchDown,COM_MIN]

#Jump Height to Flight Time Ratio
- parameter: Jump_height_flight_time_ratio_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_DVJ_B,FlightTime_DVJ_B]

- parameter: Jump_height_flight_time_ratio_DVJ_L
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_DVJ_L,FlightTime_DVJ_L]

- parameter: Jump_height_flight_time_ratio_DVJ_R
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_DVJ_R,FlightTime_DVJ_R]

- parameter: Jump_height_flight_time_ratio_static_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_static_DVJ_B,FlightTime_DVJ_B]

- parameter: Jump_height_flight_time_ratio_static_DVJ_L
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_static_DVJ_L,FlightTime_DVJ_L]

- parameter: Jump_height_flight_time_ratio_static_DVJ_R
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_static_DVJ_R,FlightTime_DVJ_R]

- parameter: Jump_height_flight_time_ratio_takeoff_vel_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_takeoff_vel_DVJ_B,FlightTime_DVJ_B]

- parameter: Jump_height_flight_time_ratio_takeoff_vel_DVJ_L
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_takeoff_vel_DVJ_L,FlightTime_DVJ_L]

- parameter: Jump_height_flight_time_ratio_takeoff_vel_DVJ_R
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_takeoff_vel_DVJ_R,FlightTime_DVJ_R]

- parameter: Jump_height_flight_time_ratio_impulse_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_impulse_DVJ_B,FlightTime_DVJ_B]

- parameter: Jump_height_flight_time_ratio_impulse_DVJ_L
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_impulse_DVJ_L,FlightTime_DVJ_L]

- parameter: Jump_height_flight_time_ratio_impulse_DVJ_R
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_impulse_DVJ_R,FlightTime_DVJ_R]

# Jump height to Contact Time Ratio
- parameter: Jump_height_contact_time_ratio_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_DVJ_B, ContactTime_DVJ_B]

- parameter: Jump_height_contact_time_ratio_DVJ_L
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_DVJ_L, ContactTime_DVJ_L]

- parameter: Jump_height_contact_time_ratio_DVJ_R
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_DVJ_R, ContactTime_DVJ_R]

- parameter: Jump_height_contact_time_ratio_static_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_static_DVJ_B, ContactTime_DVJ_B]

- parameter: Jump_height_contact_time_ratio_static_DVJ_L
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_static_DVJ_L, ContactTime_DVJ_L]

- parameter: Jump_height_contact_time_ratio_static_DVJ_R
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_static_DVJ_R, ContactTime_DVJ_R]

- parameter: Jump_height_contact_time_ratio_takeoff_vel_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_takeoff_vel_DVJ_B, ContactTime_DVJ_B]

- parameter: Jump_height_contact_time_ratio_takeoff_vel_DVJ_L
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_takeoff_vel_DVJ_L, ContactTime_DVJ_L]

- parameter: Jump_height_contact_time_ratio_takeoff_vel_DVJ_R
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_takeoff_vel_DVJ_R, ContactTime_DVJ_R]

- parameter: Jump_height_contact_time_ratio_impulse_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_impulse_DVJ_B, ContactTime_DVJ_B]

- parameter: Jump_height_contact_time_ratio_impulse_DVJ_L
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_impulse_DVJ_L, ContactTime_DVJ_L]

- parameter: Jump_height_contact_time_ratio_impulse_DVJ_R
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_impulse_DVJ_R, ContactTime_DVJ_R]

# Flight time to Contraction time ratio
- parameter: Flight_Contraction_time_ratio_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
  steps:
    - divide: [FlightTime_DVJ_B, EccentricTime_DVJ_B]

- parameter: Flight_Contraction_time_ratio_DVJ_L
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
  steps:
    - divide: [FlightTime_DVJ_L, EccentricTime_DVJ_L]

- parameter: Flight_Contraction_time_ratio_DVJ_R
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
  steps:
    - divide: [FlightTime_DVJ_R, EccentricTime_DVJ_R]

# Reactive strength index
- parameter: Reactive_strength_index_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
  steps:
    - divide: [FlightTime_DVJ_B, ContactTime_DVJ_B]

- parameter: Reactive_strength_index_DVJ_L
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
  steps:
    - divide: [FlightTime_DVJ_L, ContactTime_DVJ_L]

- parameter: Reactive_strength_index_DVJ_R
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
  steps:
    - divide: [FlightTime_DVJ_R, ContactTime_DVJ_R]

# Modified reactive strength index
- parameter: Reactive_strength_index_modified_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_DVJ_B, ContactTime_DVJ_B]

- parameter: Reactive_strength_index_modified_DVJ_L
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_DVJ_L, ContactTime_DVJ_L]

- parameter: Reactive_strength_index_modified_DVJ_R
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
  steps:
    - divide: [COM_displacement_MEAN_max_DVJ_R, ContactTime_DVJ_R]

# Kinetics ----------
# Bilateral
- parameter: Left_RFD
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
    force: left
  steps:
    - derivative: Left GRF
    - if: "!empty(Total GRF_both.x)"
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]

- parameter: Left_RFD
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
    force: left
  steps:
    - derivative: Left GRF

- parameter: Left Power
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
    force: left
  steps:
    - multiply: [Left GRF, PelvisCGPos_vel]
    - if: "!empty(Total GRF_both.x)"
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]

- parameter: Left Power
  where:
    name: DJ_L*
    force: left
  steps:
    - multiply: [Left GRF, PelvisCGPos_vel]

- parameter: Right_RFD
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
    force: right
  steps:
    - derivative: Right GRF
    - if: "!empty(Total GRF_both.x)"
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]

- parameter: Right_RFD
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
    force: right
  steps:
    - derivative: Right GRF

- parameter: Right Power
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
    force: right
  steps:
    - multiply: [Right GRF, PelvisCGPos_vel]
    - if: "!empty(Total GRF_both.x)"
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]

- parameter: Right Power
  where:
    name: DJ_R*
    force: right
  steps:
    - multiply: [Right GRF, PelvisCGPos_vel]

# Total
# find out which FP is loaded
# it is assumed that only two FPs are connected to the system
# It can be one or two loaded FPs
- parameter: FP1_load
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
    force: any
  steps:
    - if: exists(ForcePlate1)
      then: ForcePlate1.fz
      else: [[0]]
    - abs:
    - mean:

- parameter: FP2_load
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
    force: any
  steps:
    - if: exists(ForcePlate2)
      then: ForcePlate2.fz
      else: [[0]]
    - abs:
    - mean:

- parameter: GRF_loaded_FP
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
    force: any
  steps:
    - if: (FP1_load > FP2_load)
      then: ForcePlate1
      else: ForcePlate2
    - vector: [$prev.fx, $prev.fy, $prev.fz]
      space: VirtualLab
    - divide: [$prev, BodyWeightNewton]
    - negate:
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: 10
      extrapolate: 75

- parameter: Total GRF_both
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
    force: both
  steps:
    - add: [Left GRF, Right GRF]
    - if: FP1_load > 20 && FP2_load > 20
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]

- parameter: Total GRF_single
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
    force: any
  steps:
    - import: GRF_loaded_FP
    - if: FP1_load < 20 || FP2_load < 20
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]

- parameter: Total GRF
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
    force: any
  steps:
    - if: "!empty(Total GRF_both.x)"
      then: Total GRF_both
      else: Total GRF_single

# Bilateral Power
# Power = F * v
- parameter: Bilateral Power_both
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
    force: both
  steps:
    - add: [Left GRF, Right GRF]
    - multiply: [$prev, PelvisCGPos_vel]
    - if: FP1_load > 20 && FP2_load > 20
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]

- parameter: Bilateral Power_single
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
    force: any
  steps:
    - vector: [ForcePlate1.fx, ForcePlate1.fy, ForcePlate1.fz]
    - multiply: [$prev, PelvisCGPos_vel]
    - if: FP1_load < 20 || FP2_load < 20
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]

- parameter: Bilateral Power
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
    force: any
  steps:
    - if: "!empty(Total GRF_both.x)"
      then: Bilateral Power_both
      else: Bilateral Power_single

- parameter: Bilateral Power_max_concentric_DVJ_B
  where:
    name: DJ_B*
    force: any
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Bilateral Power, Eccentric_end, TakeOff]

  where:

    - if: "!empty(Total GRF_both.x)"
```

---

### Template: Ll
_File: `templates/fa/ll.calqulus.yaml`_

```yaml

############
## SPACES ##
############

- space: VirtualLab
  alignWithSegment:
    segment: Hips_model

############
## EVENTS ##
############

- template: /templates/events-kinetics.calqulus.yaml
  where:
    force: any

- event: BOF
  steps:
    - import: [0]

- event: EOF
  steps:
    - subtract: [$length, 1]

- event: COM_MIN
  steps:
    - min: Hips_model.z
      frames: true

- event: PlotStart_stand_temp
  steps:
    - negate: PelvisCGPos_vel
    - lowpass:
    - threshold: $prev.z
      value: 0.05
      direction: up
    - eventMask: [$prev, BOF, COM_MIN]
    - import: $prev@1
    # - subtract: [$prev, 1]

- event: PlotStart_stand
  steps:
    - if: empty(PlotStart_stand_temp)
      then: BOF_fixed
      else: PlotStart_stand_temp

# Left
- event: LFT_DistEndVel_max
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  steps:
    - max: LFT_DistEndVel.x
      frames: true

- event: LFT_DistEndVel_min
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  steps:
    - min: LFT_DistEndVel.x
      frames: true

- event: LFT_DistEndVel_first
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  steps:
    - if: LFT_DistEndVel_max < LFT_DistEndVel_min
      then: LFT_DistEndVel_max
      else: LFT_DistEndVel_min

- event: LFT_DistEndVel_second
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  steps:
    - if: LFT_DistEndVel_max > LFT_DistEndVel_min
      then: LFT_DistEndVel_max
      else: LFT_DistEndVel_min

- event: TouchDown_kinematics
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [LFT_DistEndVel.z, LFT_DistEndVel_first, LFT_DistEndVel_second]
    - max:
      frames: true
      output: temp_max
    - eventMask: [LFT_DistEndVel.z, LFT_DistEndVel_first, temp_max]
    - min:
      frames: true

# emptyEvent is a workaround to avoid `if` statement in TouchDown_prio to fail due to nonexistant TouchDown event
# Needed for LL from stand where ThouchDown does not exist
- event: emptyEvent
  steps:
    - import: [[-1]] #this creates empty signal

- event: my_LON_force
  where:
    name: LL_L*
    force: left
  steps:
    - if: exists(LON_force)
      then: LON_force@1
      else: emptyEvent
    - eventMask: [$prev, LFT_DistEndVel_first, LFT_DistEndVel_second]
      frames: true

- event: TouchDown
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  steps:
    - if: exists(my_LON_force)
      then: my_LON_force
      else: TouchDown_kinematics

- event: TouchDown_prio
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  steps:
    - median: PelvisCGPos.x
      export: median
    - import: PelvisCGPos.x@BOF
      export: first
    - import: PelvisCGPos.x@EOF
      export: last
    - if: (first < median && median < last) || (first > median && median > last)
      then: PlotStart_stand
      else: TouchDown

- event: PlotStart
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  steps:
    - if: exists(my_LON_force)
      then: my_LON_force@1
      else: TouchDown_prio

- event: TakeOff_kinematics
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [LFT_DistEndVel.x, TouchDown, LFT_DistEndVel_second]
    - threshold: $prev
      value: 1
      direction: up
    - import: $prev@-1

- event: LOFF_force_ordered
  where:
    name: LL_L*
    force: left
  steps:
    - import: LOFF_force
    - concatenate: [$prev, []]
      sort: asc

- event: TakeOff
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  steps:
    - if: exists(LOFF_force_ordered)
      then: LOFF_force_ordered@-1
      else: TakeOff_kinematics

- event: Landing_L
  steps:
    - eventMask: [LFT_DistEndAcc.z, TakeOff, EOF]
    - max:
      frames: true

- event: pelvis_lowest
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [PelvisCGPos.z, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - min:
      frames: true

# Right
- event: RFT_DistEndVel_max
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  steps:
    - negate: RFT_DistEndVel.x
    - max: $prev
      frames: true

- event: RFT_DistEndVel_min
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  steps:
    - negate: RFT_DistEndVel.x
    - min: $prev
      frames: true

- event: RFT_DistEndVel_first
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  steps:
    - if: RFT_DistEndVel_max < RFT_DistEndVel_min
      then: RFT_DistEndVel_max
      else: RFT_DistEndVel_min

- event: RFT_DistEndVel_second
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  steps:
    - if: RFT_DistEndVel_max > RFT_DistEndVel_min
      then: RFT_DistEndVel_max
      else: RFT_DistEndVel_min

- event: TouchDown_kinematics
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [RFT_DistEndVel.z, RFT_DistEndVel_first, RFT_DistEndVel_second]
    - max:
      frames: true
      output: temp_max
    - eventMask: [RFT_DistEndVel.z, RFT_DistEndVel_first, temp_max]
    - min: 
      frames: true

- event: my_RON_force
  where:
    name: LL_R*
    force: right
  steps:
    - if: exists(RON_force)
      then: RON_force@1
      else: emptyEvent
    - eventMask: [$prev, RFT_DistEndVel_first, RFT_DistEndVel_second]
      frames: true

- event: TouchDown
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  steps:
    - if: exists(my_RON_force)
      then: my_RON_force
      else: TouchDown_kinematics

- parameter: PelvisCGPos
  steps:
    - vector: [Hips_model.x, Hips_model.y, Hips_model.z]
      space: VirtualLab
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

- event: TouchDown_prio
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  steps:
    - median: PelvisCGPos.x
      export: median
    - import: PelvisCGPos.x@BOF
      export: first
    - import: PelvisCGPos.x@EOF
      export: last
    # - if: (0.5 < 0 && 0 < -0.2) || (0.5 > 0 && 0 > -0.2)
    - if: (first < median && median < last) || (first > median && median > last)
      then: PlotStart_stand
      else: TouchDown

- event: PlotStart
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  steps:
    - if: exists(my_RON_force)
      then: my_RON_force@1
      else: TouchDown_prio

- event: TakeOff_kinematics
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  steps:
    - negate: RFT_DistEndVel
    - eventMask: [$prev.x, TouchDown, RFT_DistEndVel_min]
    - threshold: $prev
      value: 1
      direction: up
    - import: $prev@-1

- event: ROFF_force_ordered
  where:
    name: LL_R*
    force: right
  steps:
    - import: ROFF_force
    - concatenate: [$prev, []]
      sort: asc

- event: TakeOff
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  steps:
    - if: exists(ROFF_force_ordered)
      then: ROFF_force_ordered@-1
      else: TakeOff_kinematics

- event: Landing_R
  steps:
    - eventMask: [RFT_DistEndAcc.z, TakeOff, EOF]
    - max:
      frames: true

- event: pelvis_lowest
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [PelvisCGPos.z, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - min:
      frames: true

# Unified event names for web
- event: LeftPlotStart
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: PlotStart

- event: LeftPlotEnd
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: TakeOff

- event: RightPlotStart
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: PlotStart

- event: RightPlotEnd
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: TakeOff

############
## SERIES ##
############

- template: /templates/timeseries.calqulus.yaml

#############
## Metrics ##
#############

# COM @TakeOff, max, min
# We use Pelvis COM for now
- parameter: COM_Z_TO_LL_L
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  steps:
    - vector: [Hips_model.x, Hips_model.y, Hips_model.z]
    - import: $prev@TakeOff
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: CenterOfMass_MIN
  steps:
    - min: Hips_model.z
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: CenterOfMass@PlotStart
  steps:
    - vector: [Hips_model.x, Hips_model.y, Hips_model.z]
    - import: $prev@PlotStart
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: COM_displacement_MEAN_min_LL_L 
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  steps:
    - subtract: [CenterOfMass\@PlotStart, CenterOfMass_MIN]
    - import: $prev.z

- parameter: COM_displacement_MEAN_min_LL_R
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  steps:
    - subtract: [CenterOfMass\@PlotStart, CenterOfMass_MIN]
    - import: $prev.z

# COM distance to knee and ankle #####
# Left ------
# @TouchDown
- parameter: Left_Ankle_COM_distance@TouchDown_LL_L
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left_Ankle_COM_distance@TouchDown

- parameter: Left_Knee_COM_distance@TouchDown_LL_L
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left_Knee_COM_distance@TouchDown

# @TakeOff
- parameter: Left_Ankle_COM_distance@TakeOff_LL_L
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left_Ankle_COM_distance@TakeOff

- parameter: Left_Knee_COM_distance@TakeOff_LL_L
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left_Knee_COM_distance@TakeOff

# Other metrics @TouchDown
- parameter: Left Knee Angles@TouchDown_LL_L
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left Knee Angles@TouchDown

- parameter: Left Hip Angles@TouchDown_LL_L
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left Hip Angles@TouchDown

- parameter: Left Thorax Angles@TouchDown_LL_L
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left Thorax Angles@TouchDown

# @COM_MIN
- parameter: Left Ankle Angles@COM_MIN_LL_L
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left Ankle Angles@COM_MIN

- parameter: Left Knee Angles@COM_MIN_LL_L
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left Knee Angles@COM_MIN

- parameter: Left Hip Angles@COM_MIN_LL_L
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left Hip Angles@COM_MIN

# @Max
- parameter: Left Hip Angles_max_LL_L
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Hip Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - max:

- parameter: Left Knee Angles_max_LL_L
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Knee Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - max:

- parameter: Left Ankle Angles_max_LL_L
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Ankle Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - max:

- parameter: Left Foot Progression_max_LL_L
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Foot Progression, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - max:

# Right ------
# @TouchDown
- parameter: Right_Ankle_COM_distance@TouchDown_LL_R
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: Right_Ankle_COM_distance@TouchDown

- parameter: Right_Knee_COM_distance@TouchDown_LL_R
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: Right_Knee_COM_distance@TouchDown

# @TakeOff
- parameter: Right_Ankle_COM_distance@TakeOff_LL_R
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: Right_Ankle_COM_distance@TakeOff

- parameter: Right_Knee_COM_distance@TakeOff_LL_R
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: Right_Knee_COM_distance@TakeOff

# Other metrics @TouchDown
- parameter: Right Knee Angles@TouchDown_LL_R
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: Right Knee Angles@TouchDown

- parameter: Right Hip Angles@TouchDown_LL_R
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: Right Hip Angles@TouchDown

- parameter: Right Thorax Angles@TouchDown_LL_R
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: Right Thorax Angles@TouchDown

# @COM_MIN
- parameter: Right Ankle Angles@COM_MIN_LL_R
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: Right Ankle Angles@COM_MIN

- parameter: Right Knee Angles@COM_MIN_LL_R
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: Right Knee Angles@COM_MIN

- parameter: Right Hip Angles@COM_MIN_LL_R
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: Right Hip Angles@COM_MIN

# @Max
- parameter: Right Hip Angles_max_LL_R
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  set: right
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Hip Angles, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - max:

- parameter: Right Knee Angles_max_LL_R
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  set: right
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Knee Angles, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - max:

- parameter: Right Ankle Angles_max_LL_R
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  set: right
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Ankle Angles, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - max:

- parameter: Right Foot Progression_max_LL_R
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  set: right
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Foot Progression, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - max:

# Jump distance - calculated as distance traveled by proximal end of foot from TakeOff to Landing
# Left
- parameter: LFT_DistEndPos@TakeOff
  steps:
    - import: LFT_DistEndPos@TakeOff

- parameter: RFT_DistEndPos@Landing_R
  steps:
    - import: RFT_DistEndPos@Landing_R

- parameter: Left_jump_distance
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  steps:
    - subtract: [LFT_DistEndPos@TakeOff, RFT_DistEndPos@Landing_R]
    - abs:

# Right
- parameter: RFT_DistEndPos@TakeOff
  steps:
    - import: RFT_DistEndPos@TakeOff

- parameter: LFT_DistEndPos@Landing_L
  steps:
    - import: LFT_DistEndPos@Landing_L

- parameter: Right_jump_distance
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  steps:
    - subtract: [RFT_DistEndPos@TakeOff, LFT_DistEndPos@Landing_L]
    - abs:

# Kinetics -----
# Left
- parameter: Left Hip Moment@COM_MIN_LL_L
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  steps:
    - import: Left Hip Moment@COM_MIN

- parameter: Left Knee Moment@COM_MIN_LL_L
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  steps:
    - import: Left Knee Moment@COM_MIN

- parameter: Left Ankle Moment@COM_MIN_LL_L
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  steps:
    - import: Left Ankle Moment@COM_MIN

- parameter: Left GRF_max_LL_L
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left GRF, PlotStart, TakeOff]
    - max:

- parameter: Left GRF_max_landing_LL_L
  where:
    name: LL_L*

    - max:

- parameter: Left GRF_mean_landing_LL_L

    - mean:

- parameter: Left GRF_max_concentric_LL_L
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left GRF, pelvis_lowest, LeftPlotEnd]
    - max:

- parameter: Left GRF_mean_concentric_LL_L
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left GRF, pelvis_lowest, LeftPlotEnd]
    - mean:

- parameter: Left GRF_max_eccentric_LL_L
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left GRF, LeftPlotStart, pelvis_lowest]
    - max:

- parameter: Left GRF_mean_eccentric_LL_L
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left GRF, LeftPlotStart, pelvis_lowest]
    - mean:

- parameter: Left Knee Moment_max_LL_L
  where:
    name: LL_L*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Knee Moment, PlotStart, TakeOff]
    - max:

# Right
- parameter: Right Hip Moment@COM_MIN_LL_R
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  steps:
    - import: Right Hip Moment@COM_MIN

- parameter: Right Knee Moment@COM_MIN_LL_R
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  steps:
    - import: Right Knee Moment@COM_MIN

- parameter: Right Ankle Moment@COM_MIN_LL_R
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  steps:
    - import: Right Ankle Moment@COM_MIN

- parameter: Right GRF_max_LL_R
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right GRF, PlotStart, TakeOff]
    - max:

- parameter: Right GRF_max_landing_LL_R
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right GRF, PlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - max:

- parameter: Right GRF_mean_landing_LL_R
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right GRF, PlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - mean:

- parameter: Right GRF_max_concentric_LL_R
  where:
    name: LL_R*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right GRF, pelvis_lowest, RightPlotEnd]
    - max:

- parameter: Right GRF_mean_concentric_LL_R

- parameter: Right GRF_max_eccentric_LL_R

- parameter: Right GRF_mean_eccentric_LL_R

  steps:
```

---

### Template: Lunge
_File: `templates/fa/lunge.calqulus.yaml`_

```yaml

############
## SPACES ##
############

- space: VirtualLab
  alignWithSegment:
    segment: Hips_model

############
## EVENTS ##
############

- template: /templates/events-kinetics.calqulus.yaml
  where:
    force: any

- event: BOF
  steps:
    - import: [0]

- event: EOF
  steps:
    - subtract: [$length, 1]

# `Graph event mode`:
#     No events (Default) [Full measurement]:
#         BOF and EOF for all graph types
#     Forceplate events [From forceplates]:
#         Same events for all graphs based on forceplates data (RON_force, ROFF_force, LON_force and LOFF_force)
#     Manual events [Manual]:
#         Same manual events for all graph types (Rstart, Rend, Lstart, Lend)
#         Different manual events for all graph types (Rstart, RON, Rend, ROFF, Lstart, LON, Lend, LOFF)

# LeftPlotStart ------------
- event: LeftPlotStart
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: BOF

# LeftPlotStartForce ------------
- event: LeftPlotStartForce
  set: left
  steps:
    - if: exists(LON_force)
      then: LON_force
      else: BOF

# LeftPlotEnd ------------
- event: LeftPlotEnd
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: EOF

# LeftPlotEndForce ------------
- event: LeftPlotEndForce
  set: left
  steps:
    - if: exists(LOFF_force)
      then: LOFF_force
      else: EOF

# RightPlotStart ------------
- event: RightPlotStart
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: BOF

# RightPlotStartForce ------------
- event: RightPlotStartForce
  set: right
  steps:
    - if: exists(RON_force)
      then: RON_force
      else: BOF

# RightPlotEnd ------------
- event: RightPlotEnd
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: EOF

# RightPlotEndForce ------------
- event: RightPlotEndForce
  set: right
  steps:
    - if: exists(ROFF_force)
      then: ROFF_force
      else: EOF

############
## SERIES ##
############

- template: /templates/timeseries.calqulus.yaml

# Following pelvis and thorax are required by layout
# --- Pelvis ---

- parameter: Pelvic Angles
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  steps:
    - angle: Hips_model # angle is calculated relative to axes of global coordinate system, if only single input exists
      space: VirtualLab # calculate angle relative to virtual lab
    - multiply: [$prev, [-1, 1, 1]] # invert first component of output

# --- Thorax ---

- parameter: Thorax Angles
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  steps:
    - angle: [Hips_model, Spine2_model]
    - multiply: [$prev, [-1, -1, 1]]

#############
## Metrics ##
#############

# Find global maximum/minimum/mean/range

# Left ----
# Pelvis
- parameter: Left Pelvic Angles_max
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Pelvic Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - max: 

- parameter: Left Pelvic Angles_min
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Pelvic Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - min: 

- parameter: Left Pelvic Angles_mean
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Pelvic Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - mean: 

- parameter: Pelvis Tilt max
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Pelvic Angles
    - eventMask: [$prev, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - max: $prev.x

- parameter: Pelvis Tilt min
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Pelvic Angles
    - eventMask: [$prev, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - min: $prev.x

- parameter: Pelvis Tilt range
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: left
  steps:
    - subtract: [Pelvis Tilt max, Pelvis Tilt min]

# Hips
- parameter: Left Hip Angles_max
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Hip Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - max: 

- parameter: Left Hip Angles_min
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Hip Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - min: 

- parameter: Left Hip Angles_mean
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Hip Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - mean: 

- parameter: Left Hip Flex max
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left Hip Angles
    - eventMask: [$prev, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - max: $prev.x

- parameter: Left Hip Flex min
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left Hip Angles
    - eventMask: [$prev, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - min: $prev.x

- parameter: Left Hip Flex range
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: left
  steps:
    - subtract: [Left Hip Flex max, Left Hip Flex min]

# Knees
- parameter: Left Knee Angles_max
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Knee Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - max: 

- parameter: Left Knee Angles_min
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Knee Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - min: 

- parameter: Left Knee Angles_mean
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Knee Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - mean: 

- parameter: Left Knee Flex max
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left Knee Angles
    - eventMask: [$prev, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - max: $prev.x

- parameter: Left Knee Flex min
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left Knee Angles
    - eventMask: [$prev, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - min: $prev.x

- parameter: Left Knee Flex range
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: left
  steps:
    - subtract: [Left Knee Flex max, Left Knee Flex min]

# Ankles
- parameter: Left Ankle Angles_max
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Ankle Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - max: 

- parameter: Left Ankle Angles_min
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Ankle Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - min: 

- parameter: Left Ankle Angles_mean
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Ankle Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - mean: 

- parameter: Left Ankle Flex max
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left Ankle Angles
    - eventMask: [$prev, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - max: $prev.x

- parameter: Left Ankle Flex min
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left Ankle Angles
    - eventMask: [$prev, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - min: $prev.x

- parameter: Left Ankle Flex range
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: left
  steps:
    - subtract: [Left Ankle Flex max, Left Ankle Flex min]

# Feet
- parameter: Left Foot Pitch Angles_max
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Foot Pitch Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - max: 

- parameter: Left Foot Pitch Angles_min
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Foot Pitch Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - min: 

- parameter: Left Foot Pitch Angles_mean
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Foot Pitch Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - mean: 

# Copy of previous signal for compatibility with report layout
- parameter: Left Foot Progression_max
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left Foot Pitch Angles_max

- parameter: Left Foot Progression_min
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left Foot Pitch Angles_min

- parameter: Left Foot Progression_mean
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left Foot Pitch Angles_mean

# Shoulders
- parameter: Left Shoulder Angles_max
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Shoulder Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - max: 

- parameter: Left Shoulder Angles_min
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Shoulder Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - min: 

- parameter: Left Shoulder Angles_mean
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Shoulder Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - mean: 

- parameter: Left Shoulder Ang Vel_max
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Shoulder Ang Vel, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - max: 

- parameter: Left Shoulder Ang Vel_min
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Shoulder Ang Vel, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - min: 

- parameter: Left Shoulder Ang Vel_mean
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Shoulder Ang Vel, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - mean: 

- parameter: Left Shoulder Flex max
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left Shoulder Angles
    - eventMask: [$prev, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - max: $prev.x

- parameter: Left Shoulder Flex min
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left Shoulder Angles
    - eventMask: [$prev, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - min: $prev.x

- parameter: Left Shoulder Flex range
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: left
  steps:
    - subtract: [Left Shoulder Flex max, Left Shoulder Flex min]

# Elbows
- parameter: Left Elbow Angles_max
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Elbow Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - max: 

- parameter: Left Elbow Angles_min
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Elbow Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - min: 

- parameter: Left Elbow Angles_mean
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Elbow Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - mean: 

- parameter: Left Elbow Flex max
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left Elbow Angles
    - eventMask: [$prev, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - max: $prev.x

- parameter: Left Elbow Flex min
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left Elbow Angles
    - eventMask: [$prev, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - min: $prev.x

- parameter: Left Elbow Flex range
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: left
  steps:
    - subtract: [Left Elbow Flex max, Left Elbow Flex min]

# Wrists
- parameter: Left Wrist Angles_max
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Wrist Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - max: 

- parameter: Left Wrist Angles_min
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Wrist Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - min: 

- parameter: Left Wrist Angles_mean
  set: left
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Wrist Angles, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - mean: 

- parameter: Left Wrist Flex max
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left Wrist Angles
    - eventMask: [$prev, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - max: $prev.x

- parameter: Left Wrist Flex min
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left Wrist Angles
    - eventMask: [$prev, LeftPlotStart, LeftPlotEnd]
    - min: $prev.x

- parameter: Left Wrist Flex range
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: left
  steps:
    - subtract: [Left Wrist Flex max, Left Wrist Flex min]
```
