```yaml
  set: right
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Shoulder Ang Vel, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - max: 

- parameter: Right Shoulder Ang Vel_min
  set: right
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Shoulder Ang Vel, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - min: 

- parameter: Right Shoulder Ang Vel_mean
  set: right
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Shoulder Ang Vel, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - mean: 

- parameter: Right Shoulder Flex max
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: Right Shoulder Angles
    - eventMask: [$prev, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - max: $prev.x

- parameter: Right Shoulder Flex min
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: Right Shoulder Angles
    - eventMask: [$prev, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - min: $prev.x

- parameter: Right Shoulder Flex range
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: right
  steps:
    - subtract: [Right Shoulder Flex max, Right Shoulder Flex min]

# Elbows
- parameter: Right Elbow Angles_max
  set: right
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Elbow Angles, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - max: 

- parameter: Right Elbow Angles_min
  set: right
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Elbow Angles, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - min: 

- parameter: Right Elbow Angles_mean
  set: right
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Elbow Angles, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - mean: 

- parameter: Right Elbow Flex max
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: Right Elbow Angles
    - eventMask: [$prev, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - max: $prev.x

- parameter: Right Elbow Flex min
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: Right Elbow Angles
    - eventMask: [$prev, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - min: $prev.x

- parameter: Right Elbow Flex range
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: right
  steps:
    - subtract: [Right Elbow Flex max, Right Elbow Flex min]

# Wrists
- parameter: Right Wrist Angles_max
  set: right
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Wrist Angles, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - max: 

- parameter: Right Wrist Angles_min
  set: right
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Wrist Angles, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - min: 

- parameter: Right Wrist Angles_mean
  set: right
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Wrist Angles, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - mean: 

- parameter: Right Wrist Flex max
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: Right Wrist Angles
    - eventMask: [$prev, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - max: $prev.x

- parameter: Right Wrist Flex min
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: Right Wrist Angles
    - eventMask: [$prev, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - min: $prev.x

- parameter: Right Wrist Flex range
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: right
  steps:
    - subtract: [Right Wrist Flex max, Right Wrist Flex min]

# Thorax
- parameter: Right Thorax Angles_max
  set: right
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Thorax Angles, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - max: 

- parameter: Right Thorax Angles_min
  set: right
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Thorax Angles, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - min: 

- parameter: Right Thorax Angles_mean
  set: right
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Thorax Angles, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - mean:

- parameter: Right Thorax_Lab Angles_max
  set: right
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Thorax_Lab Angles, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - max: 

- parameter: Right Thorax_Lab Angles_min
  set: right
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Thorax_Lab Angles, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - min: 

- parameter: Right Thorax_Lab Angles_mean
  set: right
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Thorax_Lab Angles, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - mean:

# Head
- parameter: Head Forward Tilt max
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Head Angles
    - eventMask: [$prev, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - max: $prev.x

- parameter: Head Forward Tilt min
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Head Angles
    - eventMask: [$prev, RightPlotStart, RightPlotEnd]
    - min: $prev.x

- parameter: Head Forward Tilt range
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
  set: left
  steps:
    - subtract: [Head Forward Tilt max, Head Forward Tilt min]

# Kinetics ---
# Left
- parameter: Left Hip Moment_max
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
   - max: Left Hip Moment

- parameter: Left Knee Moment_max
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
   - max: Left Knee Moment

- parameter: Left Ankle Moment_max
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
   - max: Left Ankle Moment

- parameter: Left Hip Power_max
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
   - max: Left Hip Power

- parameter: Left Knee Power_max
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
   - max: Left Knee Moment

- parameter: Left Ankle Power_max
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
   - max: Left Ankle Moment

- parameter: Left GRF_max
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
   - max: Left GRF

- parameter: Left Hip Moment_min
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
   - min: Left Hip Moment

- parameter: Left Knee Moment_min
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
   - min: Left Knee Moment

- parameter: Left Ankle Moment_min
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
   - min: Left Ankle Moment

- parameter: Left Hip Power_min
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
   - min: Left Hip Power

- parameter: Left Knee Power_min
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
   - min: Left Knee Moment

- parameter: Left Ankle Power_min
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
   - min: Left Ankle Moment

- parameter: Left GRF_min
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
   - min: Left GRF

- parameter: Left Hip Moment_mean
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
   - mean: Left Hip Moment

- parameter: Left Knee Moment_mean
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
   - mean: Left Knee Moment

- parameter: Left Ankle Moment_mean
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
   - mean: Left Ankle Moment

- parameter: Left Hip Power_mean
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
   - mean: Left Hip Power

- parameter: Left Knee Power_mean
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
   - mean: Left Knee Moment

- parameter: Left Ankle Power_mean
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
   - mean: Left Ankle Moment

- parameter: Left GRF_mean
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
   - mean: Left GRF

# Right
- parameter: Right Hip Moment_max
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: right
  set: right
  steps:
   - max: Right Hip Moment

- parameter: Right Knee Moment_max
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: right
  set: right
  steps:
   - max: Right Knee Moment

- parameter: Right Ankle Moment_max
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: right
  set: right
  steps:
   - max: Right Ankle Moment

- parameter: Right Hip Power_max
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: right
  set: right
  steps:
   - max: Right Hip Power

- parameter: Right Knee Power_max
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: right
  set: right
  steps:
   - max: Right Knee Moment

- parameter: Right Ankle Power_max
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: right
  set: right
  steps:
   - max: Right Ankle Moment

- parameter: Right GRF_max
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: right
  set: right
  steps:
   - max: Right GRF

- parameter: Right Hip Moment_min
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: right
  set: right
  steps:
   - min: Right Hip Moment

- parameter: Right Knee Moment_min
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: right

  steps:
   - min: Right Knee Moment

- parameter: Right Ankle Moment_min
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: right
  set: right
  steps:
   - min: Right Ankle Moment

- parameter: Right Hip Power_min
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: right
  set: right
  steps:
   - min: Right Hip Power

- parameter: Right Knee Power_min
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: right
  set: right
  steps:
   - min: Right Knee Moment

- parameter: Right Ankle Power_min
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: right

  steps:
   - min: Right Ankle Moment

- parameter: Right GRF_min
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: right

- parameter: Right Hip Moment_mean
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: right

- parameter: Right Knee Moment_mean
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: right
  set: right
  steps:
   - mean: Right Knee Moment

- parameter: Right Ankle Moment_mean
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: right

  steps:
   - mean: Right Ankle Moment

  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: right
  set: right

   - mean: Right Hip Power

  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: right
  set: right
  steps:
   - mean: Right Knee Moment

- parameter: Right Ankle Power_mean
  where:
    name: '!Static*'
    force: right
  set: right
  steps:

  where:

   - mean: Right GRF
```

---

### Template: Running Events Kinematics
_File: `templates/running/running-events-kinematics.calqulus.yaml`_

```yaml
############
## EVENTS ##
############

# --- Treadmill running ---
# FS and TO event detection is based on foot velocity and acceleration
# First calculate midfoot velocity and acceleration
# Toe off
- event: LTOE_RISE
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - threshold: Left_MID_FOOT_acc.z
      value: 0
      direction: down
    - eventMask: [$prev, R_MID_STANCE, R_MID_STANCE]
      keep: -1

# - event: LTO_treadmill_old
#   set: left
#   where:
#     name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
#   steps:
#     - peakFinder: Left_MID_FOOT_acc.z => sig2
#     - eventMask: [sig2, LTOE_RISE, LTOE_RISE]
#       keep: -1

- event: LTO_treadmill
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: LHeelBack_vel.z
    - eventMask: [$prev, L_MID_STANCE, L_MID_STANCE]
    - max:
      frames: true

- event: RTOE_RISE
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - threshold: Right_MID_FOOT_acc.z
      value: 0
      direction: down
    - eventMask: [$prev, L_MID_STANCE, L_MID_STANCE]
      keep: -1

# - event: RTO_treadmill
#   set: right
#   where:
#     name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
#   steps:
#     - peakFinder: Right_MID_FOOT_acc.z => sig
#     - eventMask: [sig, RTOE_RISE, RTOE_RISE]
#       keep: -1

- event: RTO_treadmill
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: RHeelBack_vel.z
    - eventMask: [$prev, L_MID_STANCE, L_MID_STANCE]
    - max:
      frames: true

# Footstrike
- event: L_PEAK_MID_FOOT_VEL_z
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - peakFinder: Left_MID_FOOT_vel.z
      width: 10
      distance: 50
    - eventMask: [$prev, L_MID_STANCE, R_MID_STANCE]
      keep: -1

- event: L_MID_FOOT_vel_negative
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - threshold: Left_MID_FOOT_vel.z
      value: 0
      direction: up
    - eventMask: [$prev, L_PEAK_MID_FOOT_VEL_z, L_PEAK_MID_FOOT_VEL_z]
      keep: -1

- event: temp_event_1
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - threshold: Left_MID_FOOT_vel.y
      value: 0
      direction: down

- event: temp_event_2
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - peakFinder: Left_MID_FOOT_vel.y
    - eventMask: [$prev, L_PEAK_MID_FOOT_VEL_z, temp_event_1]
      keep: -1
  
- event: LFS_treadmill
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    # - peakFinder: Left_MID_FOOT_vel.z => sig
    #   width: 10
    #   distance: 50
    # - eventMask: [sig, L_MID_STANCE, R_MID_STANCE]
    #   keep: -1
    #   output: L_PEAK_MID_FOOT_VEL_z

    # #z velocity of foot has to be negative, otherwise foot is not on its way down
    # - threshold: Left_MID_FOOT_vel.z => sig1
    #   value: 0
    #   direction: up
    # - eventMask: [sig1, L_PEAK_MID_FOOT_VEL_z, L_PEAK_MID_FOOT_VEL_z]
    #   keep: -1
    #   output: L_MID_FOOT_vel_negative

    # #temp_event_1 and temp_event_2 are used to reduce range where FS is searched for
    # - threshold: Left_MID_FOOT_vel.y
    #   value: 0
    #   direction: down
    #   output: temp_event_1

    # - peakFinder: Left_MID_FOOT_vel.y => sig2
    # - eventMask: [sig2, L_PEAK_MID_FOOT_VEL_z, temp_event_1]
    #   keep: -1
    #   output: temp_event_2

    - peakFinder: Left_MID_FOOT_acc.z
    - eventMask: [$prev, temp_event_2, L_MID_FOOT_vel_negative]
      keep: -1

- event: R_PEAK_MID_FOOT_VEL_z
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - peakFinder: Right_MID_FOOT_vel.z
      width: 10
      distance: 50
    - eventMask: [$prev, R_MID_STANCE, L_MID_STANCE]
      keep: -1

- event: R_MID_FOOT_vel_negative
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - threshold: Right_MID_FOOT_vel.z
      value: 0
      direction: up
    - eventMask: [$prev, R_PEAK_MID_FOOT_VEL_z, R_PEAK_MID_FOOT_VEL_z]
      keep: -1

- event: temp_event_1
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - threshold: Right_MID_FOOT_vel.y
      value: 0
      direction: down

- event: temp_event_2
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - peakFinder: Right_MID_FOOT_vel.y
    - eventMask: [$prev, R_PEAK_MID_FOOT_VEL_z, temp_event_1]
      keep: -1

- event: RFS_treadmill
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    # - peakFinder: Right_MID_FOOT_vel.z
    #   width: 10
    #   distance: 50
    # - eventMask: [$prev, R_MID_STANCE, L_MID_STANCE]
    #   keep: -1
    #   output: R_PEAK_MID_FOOT_VEL_z

    # # z velocity of foot has to be negative, otherwise foot is not on its way down
    # - threshold: Right_MID_FOOT_vel.z
    #   value: 0
    #   direction: up
    # - eventMask: [$prev, R_PEAK_MID_FOOT_VEL_z, R_PEAK_MID_FOOT_VEL_z]
    #   keep: -1
    #   output: R_MID_FOOT_vel_negative

    # # temp_event_1 and temp_event_2 are used to reduce range where FS is searched for
    # - threshold: Right_MID_FOOT_vel.y
    #   value: 0
    #   direction: down
    #   output: temp_event_1

    # - peakFinder: Right_MID_FOOT_vel.y
    # - eventMask: [$prev, R_PEAK_MID_FOOT_VEL_z, temp_event_1]
    #   keep: -1
    #   output: temp_event_2

    - peakFinder: Right_MID_FOOT_acc.z
    - eventMask: [$prev, temp_event_2, R_MID_FOOT_vel_negative]
      keep: -1

- event: L_MID_STANCE
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - subtract: [Left_MID_FOOT, Pelvis_CGPos]
    - threshold: $prev.y
      value: 0
      direction: down

- event: R_MID_STANCE
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - subtract: [Right_MID_FOOT, Pelvis_CGPos]
    - threshold: $prev.y
      value: 0
      direction: down

# --- Overground running ---
# Based on position of distal end and proximal end of foot
# Footstrike
- event: LFS_overground
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - peakFinder: [LForefoot2_wrt_Pelvis.y]
      height: 0
      output: temp1

    - multiply: [$framerate, 0.05]
    - add: [temp1, $prev]
      output: temp2

    - import: LHeelBack_wrt_Pelvis
    - negate:
    - eventMask: [$prev.z, temp1, temp2]
    - max:
      frames: true

- event: RFS_overground
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - peakFinder: [RForefoot2_wrt_Pelvis.y]
      height: 0
      output: temp1

    - multiply: [$framerate, 0.05]
    - add: [temp1, $prev]
      output: temp2

    - import: RHeelBack_wrt_Pelvis
    - negate:
    - eventMask: [$prev.z, temp1, temp2]
    - max:
      frames: true

# Toe Off
- event: LTO_overground
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - divide: [$framerate, 40]
      output: shift
    - threshold: LForefoot2_wrt_Pelvis.y
      value: 0
      direction: down
    - subtract: [$prev,shift] # move event back by $framerate/40
      frames: true
      output: temp1

    - threshold: LForefoot2_wrt_Pelvis.y
      value: 0
      direction: down
      output: temp1a

    - threshold: LForefoot2_wrt_Pelvis.y
      value: 0
      direction: up
      output: temp1b

    - eventMask: [LForefoot2_wrt_Pelvis.y,temp1a,temp1b]
    - min:
      frames: true
      output: temp2

    - import: LeftToeBase_model
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m
    - lowpass:
      extrapolate: 100
      cutoff: 6
    - acceleration:
    - eventMask: [$prev.z,temp1,temp2]
    - max:
      frames: true
      
- event: RTO_overground
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - divide: [$framerate, 40]
      output: shift
    - threshold: RForefoot2_wrt_Pelvis.y
      value: 0
      direction: down
    - subtract: [$prev,shift] # move event back by $framerate/40
      frames: true
      output: temp1

    - threshold: RForefoot2_wrt_Pelvis.y
      value: 0
      direction: down
      output: temp1a

    - threshold: RForefoot2_wrt_Pelvis.y
      value: 0
      direction: up
      output: temp1b

    - eventMask: [RForefoot2_wrt_Pelvis.y,temp1a,temp1b]
    - min:
      frames: true
      output: temp2

    - import: RightToeBase_model
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m
    - lowpass:
      extrapolate: 100
      cutoff: 6
    - acceleration:
    - eventMask: [$prev.z,temp1,temp2]
    - max:
      frames: true

# Find out if running on treadmill or overground
# If pelvis AP range is more than 1 m we assume overground running
- event: LFS_kinematics
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - if: Pelvis_COG_range > 1
      then: LFS_overground
      else: LFS_treadmill

- event: LTO_kinematics
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - if: Pelvis_COG_range > 1
      then: LTO_overground
      else: LTO_treadmill

- event: RFS_kinematics
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - if: Pelvis_COG_range > 1
      then: RFS_overground
      else: RFS_treadmill

- event: RTO_kinematics
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - if: Pelvis_COG_range > 1
      then: RTO_overground
      else: RTO_treadmill

# ---- Merge kinetics and kinematics events ----
- parameter: force_window
  steps:
    - import: 5

- parameter: kinematics_window
  steps:
    - import: 30

- event: LFS_kinetics
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
    force: left
  steps:
    # Specify kinetics window in which evens are located
    - subtract: [LON_force, force_window]
      frames: true
      output: force_pre
    - add: [LON_force, force_window]
      frames: true
      output: force_post
      
    # Refine kinematics events (remove kinematics events inside a force event window)
    - subtract: [LFS_kinematics, kinematics_window]
      frames: true
      output: kinematics_pre
    - add: [LFS_kinematics, kinematics_window]
      frames: true
      output: kinematics_post

    # Spefify force event window in which kinematics events will be ignored (replaced by kinetics ones)
    - refineEvent: LFS_kinematics
      sequence: [kinematics_pre, LFS_kinematics, kinematics_post]
      exclude: [force_pre, force_post]

    # Combine kinematics and kinetics events
    - concatenate: [$prev, LON_force]

- event: LTO_kinetics
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
    force: left
  steps:
    - subtract: [LOFF_force, force_window]
      frames: true
      output: force_pre
    - add: [LOFF_force, force_window]
      frames: true
      output: force_post

    - subtract: [LTO_kinematics, kinematics_window]
      frames: true
      output: kinematics_pre
    - add: [LTO_kinematics, kinematics_window]
      frames: true
      output: kinematics_post

    - refineEvent: LTO_kinematics
      sequence: [kinematics_pre, LTO_kinematics, kinematics_post]
      exclude: [force_pre, force_post]

    - concatenate: [$prev, LOFF_force]

- event: RFS_kinetics
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
    force: right
  steps:
    - add: [RON_force, force_window]
      frames: true
      output: force_pre
    - subtract: [ROFF_force, force_window]
      frames: true
      output: force_post

    - subtract: [RFS_kinematics, kinematics_window]
      frames: true
      output: kinematics_pre
    - add: [RFS_kinematics, kinematics_window]
      frames: true
      output: kinematics_post

    - refineEvent: RFS_kinematics
      sequence: [kinematics_pre, RFS_kinematics, kinematics_post]
      exclude: [force_pre, force_post]

    - concatenate: [$prev, RON_force]

- event: RTO_kinetics
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
    force: right
  steps:
    - subtract: [ROFF_force, force_window]
      frames: true
      output: force_pre
    - add: [ROFF_force, force_window]
      frames: true
      output: force_post

    - subtract: [RTO_kinematics, kinematics_window]
      frames: true
      output: kinematics_pre
    - add: [RTO_kinematics, kinematics_window]
      frames: true
      output: kinematics_post

    - refineEvent: RTO_kinematics
      sequence: [kinematics_pre, RTO_kinematics, kinematics_post]
      exclude: [force_pre, force_post]

    - concatenate: [$prev, ROFF_force]

- event: LFS
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - if: exists(LFS_kinetics)
      then: LFS_kinetics
      else: LFS_kinematics

- event: LTO
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - if: exists(LTO_kinetics)
      then: LTO_kinetics
      else: LTO_kinematics

- event: RFS
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - if: exists(RFS_kinetics)
      then: RFS_kinetics
      else: RFS_kinematics

- event: RTO
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - if: exists(RTO_kinetics)
      then: RTO_kinetics
      else: RTO_kinematics

# --- ZENI ---
# Legacy event detection. Not used.

# Left ZENI Foot-Strike, Toe-Off and Mid-Stance
- parameter: Left_ZENI
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: LeftFoot_model => l_foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - lowpass: l_foot.y => heel
      extrapolate: 100
      order: 6
      cutoff: 20
    - segment: LeftToeBase_model => l_toe
      space: VirtualLab
    - lowpass: l_toe.y => toe
      extrapolate: 100
      order: 6
      cutoff: 20
    - segment: Hips_model => pelvis
      space: VirtualLab
    - lowpass: pelvis.y => sacrum
      extrapolate: 100
      order: 6
      cutoff: 20

    - subtract: [heel, sacrum]
      output: heel_diff
      export: Left_ZENI_heel_diff

    - subtract: [toe, sacrum]
      output: toe_diff
    - negate: toe_diff => toe_diff_inv
      export: Left_ZENI_toe_diff_inv
    
    - add: [heel, toe]
      output: heel_toe
    - divide: [heel_toe, 2]
      output: mid_foot
    - subtract: [mid_foot, sacrum]
      export: Left_ZENI_mid_foot_wrt_hip_x

    - abs: toe_diff => abs_toe_diff
      export: abs_toe_diff
    - negate: abs_toe_diff
      export: Left_ZENI_toe_diff_abs_inv

- event: LFS_ZENI
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - peakFinder: Left_ZENI_heel_diff
      width: 3
      distance: 20
      height: 0.65

- event: LTO_temp
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - peakFinder: Left_ZENI_toe_diff_inv
      width: 3
      distance: 20
      height: 0.65

- event: LTO_ZENI
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - refineEvent: LTO_temp
      sequence: [LFS, LTO_temp]

- event: L_MID_STANCE_ZENI
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - peakFinder: Left_ZENI_toe_diff_abs_inv => sign_change
      width: 10
      prominence: 100
    - eventMask: [sign_change, LFS, LTO]

  # Right ZENI Foot-Strike, Toe-Off and Mid-Stance
- parameter: Right_ZENI
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: RightFoot_model => r_foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - lowpass: r_foot.y => heel
      extrapolate: 100
      order: 6
      cutoff: 20
    - segment: RightToeBase_model => r_toe
      space: VirtualLab
    - lowpass: r_toe.y => toe
      extrapolate: 100
      order: 6
      cutoff: 20
    - segment: Hips_model => pelvis
      space: VirtualLab
    - lowpass: pelvis.y => sacrum
      extrapolate: 100
      order: 6
      cutoff: 20

    - subtract: [heel, sacrum]
      output: heel_diff
      export: Right_ZENI_heel_diff

    - subtract: [toe, sacrum]
      output: toe_diff
    - negate: toe_diff => toe_diff_inv
      export: Right_ZENI_toe_diff_inv
    
    - add: [heel, toe]
      output: heel_toe
    - divide: [heel_toe, 2]
      output: mid_foot
    - subtract: [mid_foot, sacrum]
      export: Right_ZENI_mid_foot_wrt_hip_x

    - abs: toe_diff => abs_toe_diff
      export: abs_toe_diff
    - negate: abs_toe_diff
      export: Right_ZENI_toe_diff_abs_inv

- event: RFS_ZENI
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - peakFinder: Right_ZENI_heel_diff
      width: 3
      distance: 20
      height: 0.65

- event: RTO_temp
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - peakFinder: Right_ZENI_toe_diff_inv
      width: 3
      distance: 20
      height: 0.65

- event: RTO_ZENI
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - refineEvent: RTO_temp
      sequence: [RFS, RTO_temp]

- event: R_MID_STANCE_ZENI
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - peakFinder: Right_ZENI_toe_diff_abs_inv => sign_change
      width: 10
      prominence: 100
    - eventMask: [sign_change, RFS, RTO]
# --- end of ZENI detection ---

# --- Additional events ---
- event: L_peak_knee_flex
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - peakFinder: Left Knee Angles.x => knee_flex_max
      width: 10
    - eventMask: [knee_flex_max, LTO, LFS]

- event: R_peak_knee_flex
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - peakFinder: Right Knee Angles.x => knee_flex_max
      width: 10
    - eventMask: [knee_flex_max, RTO, RFS]

- event: L_stride_angle_max
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - peakFinder: Left Stride Angle.x => stride_angle_max
      width: 10
      height: 20
    - eventMask: [stride_angle_max, LFS, LFS]

- event: R_stride_angle_max
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - peakFinder: Right Stride Angle.x => stride_angle_max
      width: 10
      height: 20
    - eventMask: [stride_angle_max, RFS, RFS]

- event: L_peak_hip_flex
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - peakFinder: Left Hip Angles.x => hip_flex_max
      width: 10
      height: 20
    - eventMask: [hip_flex_max, LTO, LFS]
  
- event: R_peak_hip_flex
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - peakFinder: Right Hip Angles.x => hip_flex_max
      width: 10
      height: 20
    - eventMask: [hip_flex_max, RTO, RFS]

- event: L_Ankle_cross
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - threshold: [L_ankle_crossing_pelvis]
      value: 0
      direction: up

- event: R_Ankle_cross
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - threshold: [R_ankle_crossing_pelvis]
      value: 0
      direction: up

- event: L_peak_hip_extension_stride
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - negate: Left Hip Angles.x => hip_neg
    - peakFinder: [hip_neg, LFS, LFS]
      width: 10
      height: 0

- event: R_peak_hip_extension_stride
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - negate: Right Hip Angles.x => hip_neg
    - peakFinder: [hip_neg, RFS, RFS]
      width: 10
      height: 0

- event: L_peak_knee_extension_stride
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - negate: Left Knee Angles.x => knee_neg
    - peakFinder: [knee_neg, LFS, LFS]
      width: 10
      sequence:
        ranges: L 20 H
        pattern: LH
        keep: [0]

- event: R_peak_knee_extension_stride
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - negate: Right Knee Angles.x => knee_neg
    - peakFinder: [knee_neg, RFS, RFS]
      width: 10
      sequence:
        ranges: L 20 H
        pattern: LH
        keep: [0]

# Kinetics events
- event: Left_peak_landing_GRF
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
    force: left
  steps:
    - peakFinder: Left GRF.z
    - import: $prev@1

- event: Left_peak_concentric_GRF
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
    force: left
  steps:
    - peakFinder: Left GRF.z
    - import: $prev@-1

- event: Right_peak_landing_GRF
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
    force: right
  steps:
    - peakFinder: Right GRF.z
    - import: $prev@1

- event: Right_peak_concentric_GRF
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
    force: right
  steps:
    - peakFinder: Right GRF.z
    - import: $prev@-1

# Unified event names for web
- event: LeftPlotStart
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: LFS

- event: LeftPlotEnd
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    # - import: LTO
    - import: LFS

- event: RightPlotStart
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: RFS

- event: RightPlotEnd
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    # - import: RTO
    - import: RFS

- event: LeftPlotStartForce
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
    force: left
  steps:
    - import: LON_force

- event: LeftPlotEndForce
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
    force: left
  steps:
    - import: LOFF_force

- event: RightPlotStartForce
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
    force: right
  steps:
    - import: RON_force

- event: RightPlotEndForce
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
    force: right
  steps:
    - import: ROFF_force

# Events required by running report
- event: LON
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
    force: left
  steps:
    - import: LON_force

- event: RON
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
    force: right
  steps:
    - import: RON_force
```

---

### Template: Running
_File: `templates/running/running.calqulus.yaml`_

```yaml

############
## SPACES ##
############

- space: VirtualLab
  alignWithSegment:
    segment: Hips_model

- parameter: VirtualLabOrigin
  steps:
    - vector: [Hips_model.x, Hips_model.x, Hips_model.x]
    - multiply: [$prev, 0]

- segment: VirtualLabSegment
  steps:
    - segment:
      origin: VirtualLabOrigin
      primaryAxis: [[0,0,0], [1,0,0]]
      secondaryAxis: [[0,0,0], [0,0,1]]
      order: yz 

############
## EVENTS ##
############

- template: /templates/events-kinetics.calqulus.yaml
  where:
    force: any

- template: running-events-kinematics.calqulus.yaml

############
## SERIES ##
############

- template: /templates/timeseries.calqulus.yaml

# --- event detection related parameters ---
- parameter: Left_MID_FOOT_vel
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: LeftFoot_model
      space: VirtualLab
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m
    - lowpass:
      extrapolate: 100
      cutoff: 16
      export: Left_MID_FOOT
    - velocity:
    - lowpass:
      extrapolate: 100
      cutoff: 16

- parameter: Left_MID_FOOT_acc
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: LeftFoot_model
      space: VirtualLab
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m
    - lowpass:
      extrapolate: 100
      cutoff: 12
    - acceleration:
    - lowpass:
      extrapolate: 100
      cutoff: 8 # 12 and 20 can produce LFS_treadmill event slightly too late, nearer to L_MID_FOOT_vel_negative

- parameter: LAnkle
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - vector: [LeftFoot_model.x, LeftFoot_model.y, LeftFoot_model.z]

- parameter: LeftHeelBack
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - if: exists(LHeelBack)
      then: LHeelBack
      else: LAnkle

- parameter: LHeelBack_vel
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: LeftHeelBack
    - velocity:

- parameter: Right_MID_FOOT_vel
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: RightFoot_model
      space: VirtualLab
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m
    - lowpass:
      extrapolate: 100
      cutoff: 16
      export: Right_MID_FOOT
    - velocity:
    - lowpass:
      extrapolate: 100
      cutoff: 16

- parameter: Right_MID_FOOT_acc
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: RightFoot_model
      space: VirtualLab
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m
    - lowpass:
      extrapolate: 100
      cutoff: 12
    - acceleration:
    - lowpass:
      extrapolate: 100
      cutoff: 8

- parameter: RAnkle
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - vector: [RightFoot_model.x, RightFoot_model.y, RightFoot_model.z]

- parameter: RightHeelBack
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - if: exists(RHeelBack)
      then: RHeelBack
      else: RAnkle

- parameter: RHeelBack_vel
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: RightHeelBack
    - velocity:

# Midstance event is based on pelvis position wrt foot position
- parameter: Pelvis_CGPos
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: Hips_model
      space: VirtualLab
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

# Footstrike
- parameter: LForefoot2_wrt_Pelvis
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - vector: [LeftToeBase_model.x, LeftToeBase_model.y, LeftToeBase_model.z]
      space: VirtualLab
      output: foot
    - segment: Hips_model => pelvis
      space: VirtualLab
    - subtract: [foot, pelvis]
  
- parameter: LHeelBack_wrt_Pelvis
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: LeftHeelBack => heel
      space: VirtualLab
    - segment: Hips_model => pelvis
      space: VirtualLab
    - subtract: [heel, pelvis]
  
- parameter: RForefoot2_wrt_Pelvis
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - vector: [RightToeBase_model.x, RightToeBase_model.y, RightToeBase_model.z]
      space: VirtualLab
      output: foot
    - segment: Hips_model => pelvis
      space: VirtualLab
    - subtract: [foot, pelvis]
  
- parameter: RHeelBack_wrt_Pelvis
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: RightHeelBack => heel
      space: VirtualLab
    - segment: Hips_model => pelvis
      space: VirtualLab
    - subtract: [heel, pelvis]

- parameter: Pelvis_COG_range
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Hips_model
      space: VirtualLab
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m
    - range: $prev.y

# -----------------

# # --- Pelvis ---

- parameter: Left Knee Angles_Velocity
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - velocity: Left Knee Angles => kneeAngleVel

- parameter: Right Knee Angles_Velocity
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - velocity: Right Knee Angles => kneeAngleVel

# # ---

- parameter: Left_KNEE_Lin_Velocity
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: LeftLeg_model
    - velocity: $prev
      space: VirtualLab
    - convert:
      from: mm/s
      to: m/s

- parameter: Right_KNEE_Lin_Velocity
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: RightLeg_model
    - velocity: $prev
      space: VirtualLab
    - convert:
      from: mm/s
      to: m/s

# ---

- parameter: L_KNEE_X
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: LeftLeg_model => shank
      space: VirtualLab
    - segment: Hips_model => pelvis
      space: VirtualLab
    - subtract: [pelvis, shank]
    - multiply: [$prev.y,-1]
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: R_KNEE_X
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: RightLeg_model
    - segment: Hips_model
    - subtract: [Hips_model, RightLeg_model]
      space: VirtualLab
    - multiply: [$prev.y,-1]
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

# ---

- parameter: LEFT_KNEE
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: LeftLeg_model => shank
      space: VirtualLab
    - convert: shank
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: RIGHT_KNEE
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: RightLeg_model => shank
      space: VirtualLab
    - convert: shank
      from: mm
      to: m

# --- Ankle ---

- parameter: Left Tibial Rotation
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - jointAngle: [LeftFoot_model, LeftLeg_model]
    - multiply: [$prev, [1, 1, -1]]

- parameter: Right Tibial Rotation
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - jointAngle: [RightFoot_model, RightLeg_model]

# ---

- parameter: Left Tibial Rotation_Velocity
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - velocity: Left Tibial Rotation => tibialRotVel

- parameter: Right Tibial Rotation_Velocity
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - velocity: Right Tibial Rotation => tibialRotVel

# ---

- parameter: Left Ankle Angles_Velocity
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - velocity: Left Ankle Angles => ankleAngleVel

- parameter: Right Ankle Angles_Velocity
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - velocity: Right Ankle Angles => ankleAngleVel

# ---

- parameter: Left Foot Contact Angle_shifted
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - jointAngle: LeftFoot_model => footContactAngle
      space: VirtualLab
      axis: ["X"]

- parameter: Right Foot Contact Angle_shifted
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - jointAngle: RightFoot_model => footContactAngle
      space: VirtualLab
      axis: ["X"]

# ---

- parameter: L_ANKLE_Y
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: LeftFoot_model => foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - segment: Hips_model => pelvis
      space: VirtualLab
    - subtract: [pelvis, foot]
      output: ankle

    - multiply: [ankle.y,[-1]]
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m
      export: L_ANKLE_X

    - convert: ankle.x
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: R_ANKLE_Y
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - subtract: [Hips_model, RightFoot_model]
      space: VirtualLab
      output: ankle

    - multiply: [ankle.y,-1]
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m
      export: R_ANKLE_X

    - convert: ankle.x
      from: mm
      to: m

# ---

- parameter: LEFT_ANKLE
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: LeftFoot_model => ankle
      space: VirtualLab
    - convert: ankle
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: RIGHT_ANKLE
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: RightFoot_model => ankle
      space: VirtualLab
    - convert: ankle
      from: mm
      to: m

# ---

- parameter: Left_ANKLE_Lin_Velocity
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: LeftFoot_model
      space: VirtualLab
    - velocity:
    - convert:
      from: mm/s
      to: m/s

- parameter: Right_ANKLE_Lin_Velocity
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: RightFoot_model
      space: VirtualLab
    - velocity:
    - convert:
      from: mm/s
      to: m/s

# --- Upper body ---

- parameter: Trunk Angles_wrt_LAB
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - jointAngle: Spine2_model
      space: VirtualLab
    - multiply: [$prev, [-1,1,1]]

- parameter: Shoulder_Pelvis Angle
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - jointAngle: [Hips_model, Spine2_model]

# --- Arms ---

- parameter: L_ELBOW_RT_PELVIS_Y
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - subtract: [LeftForeArm_model, Hips_model]
      space: VirtualLab
      output: elbowPelvis
    - convert: elbowPelvis.y
      from: mm
      to: m
      export: L_ELBOW_RT_PELVIS_X

    - convert: elbowPelvis.z
      from: mm
      to: m
      export: L_ELBOW_RT_PELVIS_Z

    - multiply: [elbowPelvis.x,-1]
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: R_ELBOW_RT_PELVIS_Y
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - subtract: [RightForeArm_model, Hips_model]
      space: VirtualLab
      output: elbowPelvis
    - convert: elbowPelvis.y
      from: mm
      to: m
      export: R_ELBOW_RT_PELVIS_X

    - convert: elbowPelvis.z
      from: mm
      to: m
      export: R_ELBOW_RT_PELVIS_Z

    - multiply: [elbowPelvis.x,-1]
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

# ---

- parameter: L_WRIST_RT_PELVIS_Y
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - subtract: [LeftHand_model, Hips_model]
      space: VirtualLab
      output: wristPelvis
    - convert: wristPelvis.y
      from: mm
      to: m
      export: L_WRIST_RT_PELVIS_X

    - convert: wristPelvis.z
      from: mm
      to: m
      export: L_WRIST_RT_PELVIS_Z

    - multiply: [wristPelvis.x,-1]
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: R_WRIST_RT_PELVIS_Y
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - subtract: [RightHand_model, Hips_model]
      space: VirtualLab
      output: wristPelvis
    - convert: wristPelvis.y
      from: mm
      to: m
      export: R_WRIST_RT_PELVIS_X

    - convert: wristPelvis.z
      from: mm
      to: m
      export: R_WRIST_RT_PELVIS_Z

    - multiply: [wristPelvis.x,-1]
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

# --- 
- parameter: L_ankle_crossing_pelvis
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: Hips_model => pelvis
      space: VirtualLab
    - convert: pelvis
      from: mm
      to: m
      output: pel
    - subtract: [pel.y, LEFT_ANKLE.y]

- parameter: R_ankle_crossing_pelvis
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: Hips_model => pelvis
    - convert: pelvis
      from: mm
      to: m
      space: VirtualLab
      output: pel
    - subtract: [pel.y, RIGHT_ANKLE.y]

#############
## Metrics ##
#############

# Treadmill speed (calculated from left foot and right foot at midstance)
- parameter: left_treadmill_speed
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: LeftFoot_model => l_foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - velocity: l_foot => l_foot_vel
    - multiply: [l_foot_vel.y, -1]
      output: l_foot_vel_inv
    - mean: l_foot_vel_inv@L_MID_STANCE

- parameter: right_treadmill_speed
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: RightFoot_model => r_foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - velocity: r_foot => r_foot_vel
    - multiply: [r_foot_vel.y, -1]
      output: r_foot_vel_inv
    - mean: r_foot_vel_inv@R_MID_STANCE

- parameter: treadmill_speed
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - concatenate: [left_treadmill_speed, right_treadmill_speed]
    - mean:
    - convert:
      from: mm/s
      to: m/s

- parameter: actual_running_speed_ms_treadmill
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - velocity: Hips_model => pelvis_vel
      space: VirtualLab
    - convert: pelvis_vel
      from: mm/s
      to: m/s
    - add: [$prev, treadmill_speed]
      output: pelvis_vel_adj
    - mean: pelvis_vel_adj.y
      export: walking_speed_treadmill

- parameter: actual_running_speed_ms_overground
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - velocity: Hips_model
      space: VirtualLab
    - convert:
      from: mm/s
      to: m/s
    - mean: $prev.y
      export: walking_speed_overground

- parameter: actual_running_speed_ms
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - if: Pelvis_COG_range > 1
      then: actual_running_speed_ms_overground
      else: actual_running_speed_ms_treadmill

- parameter: walking_speed # for FA report
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - if: Pelvis_COG_range > 1
      then: walking_speed_overground
      else: walking_speed_treadmill

# Seconds per meter, to be displayed as minutes per kilometer.
- parameter: seconds_per_meter
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - divide: [1, actual_running_speed_ms]

# Statures per second
# calculated as average speed divided by the subject height 
- parameter: Statures_Per_Second
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - divide: [actual_running_speed_ms, "$field(Height; measurement; numeric)"]

# Stride angle
- parameter: Left Stride Angle@max
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: LeftUpLeg_model => l_thigh
    - segment: RightUpLeg_model => r_thigh
    - jointAngle: [l_thigh, r_thigh]
      export: Left Stride Angle
    - eventMask: [$prev, LFS, LFS]
      output: angle
    - max: angle.x
     
- parameter: Right Stride Angle@max
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: LeftUpLeg_model => l_thigh
    - segment: RightUpLeg_model => r_thigh
    - jointAngle: [r_thigh, l_thigh]
      export: Right Stride Angle
    - eventMask: [$prev, RFS, RFS]
      output: angle
    - max: angle.x

# Steps/min
# 60 / ((left mean step time + right mean step time) / 2)
- parameter: Steps_Per_Minute_Mean
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
  - eventDuration: [RFS, LFS]
    export: Left_Step_Time
  - eventDuration: [LFS, RFS]
    export: Right_Step_Time
  - mean: Left_Step_Time => Left_Step_Time_mean
  - divide: [60, Left_Step_Time_mean]
    export: Left_Steps_Per_Minute_Mean
  - mean: Right_Step_Time => Right_Step_Time_mean
  - divide: [60, Right_Step_Time_mean]
    export: Right_Steps_Per_Minute_Mean
  - concatenate: [Left_Steps_Per_Minute_Mean, Right_Steps_Per_Minute_Mean]
  - mean:

# Step length
- parameter: Right_Step_Length_Mean_treadmill
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: LeftFoot_model => l_foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - segment: RightFoot_model => r_foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - subtract: [r_foot.y@RFS, l_foot.y@LFS]
      frameSequenceOrder: reverse
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m
      output: Step_Length
    - multiply: [actual_running_speed_ms, Right_Step_Time]
      output: belt_shift
    - add: [Step_Length, belt_shift]

- parameter: Right_Step_Length_Mean_overground
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: LeftFoot_model => l_foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - segment: RightFoot_model => r_foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - subtract: [r_foot.y@RFS, l_foot.y@LFS]
      frameSequenceOrder: reverse
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: Left_Step_Length_Mean_treadmill
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: LeftFoot_model => l_foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - segment: RightFoot_model => r_foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - subtract: [l_foot.y@LFS, r_foot.y@RFS]
      frameSequenceOrder: reverse
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m
      output: Step_Length
    - multiply: [actual_running_speed_ms, Left_Step_Time]
      output: belt_shift
    - add: [Step_Length, belt_shift]

- parameter: Left_Step_Length_Mean_overground
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: LeftFoot_model => l_foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - segment: RightFoot_model => r_foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - subtract: [l_foot.y@LFS, r_foot.y@RFS]
      frameSequenceOrder: reverse
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: Right_Step_Length_Mean
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - if: Pelvis_COG_range > 1
      then: Right_Step_Length_Mean_overground
      else: Right_Step_Length_Mean_treadmill
      export: Right_Step_Length # for FA Running

- parameter: Left_Step_Length_Mean
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - if: Pelvis_COG_range > 1
      then: Left_Step_Length_Mean_overground
      else: Left_Step_Length_Mean_treadmill
      export: Left_Step_Length # for FA Running

- parameter: Step_Length_Mean_MEAN
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - concatenate: [Right_Step_Length_Mean, Left_Step_Length_Mean]
    - mean:

# Stride length
- parameter: Right_Stride_Length_Mean_treadmill
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: RightFoot_model => foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - eventDuration: [RFS, RFS]
      export: right_stride_time
    - diff: foot.y@RFS
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m
      output: strideLength
    - multiply: [actual_running_speed_ms, right_stride_time]
      output: belt_shift
    - add: [strideLength, belt_shift]

- parameter: Right_Stride_Length_Mean_overground
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: RightFoot_model => foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - eventDuration: [RFS, RFS]
      export: right_stride_time
    - diff: foot.y@RFS
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: Left_Stride_Length_Mean_treadmill
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: LeftFoot_model => foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - eventDuration: [LFS, LFS]
      export: left_stride_time
    - diff: foot.y@LFS
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m
      output: strideLength
    - multiply: [actual_running_speed_ms, left_stride_time]
      output: belt_shift
    - add: [strideLength, belt_shift]

- parameter: Left_Stride_Length_Mean_overground
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: LeftFoot_model => foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - eventDuration: [LFS, LFS]
      export: left_stride_time
    - diff: foot.y@LFS
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: Right_Stride_Length_Mean
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - if: Pelvis_COG_range > 1
      then: Right_Stride_Length_Mean_overground
      else: Right_Stride_Length_Mean_treadmill
      export: Right_Stride_Length # for FA Running

- parameter: Left_Stride_Length_Mean
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - if: Pelvis_COG_range > 1
      then: Left_Stride_Length_Mean_overground
      else: Left_Stride_Length_Mean_treadmill
      export: Left_Stride_Length # for FA Running

- parameter: Stride_Length_Mean
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - concatenate: [Right_Stride_Length_Mean, Left_Stride_Length_Mean]
    - mean:
      export: Stride_Length # for FA Running

# Stride width
# note V3D script is calculating it using stride vector
- parameter: Right_Stride_Width_Mean
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: LeftFoot_model => l_foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - segment: RightFoot_model => r_foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - subtract: [r_foot.x@RFS, l_foot.x@LFS]
      frameSequenceOrder: reverse
    - abs:

- parameter: Left_Stride_Width_Mean
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: LeftFoot_model => l_foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - segment: RightFoot_model => r_foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - subtract: [l_foot.x@LFS, r_foot.x@RFS]
      frameSequenceOrder: reverse
    - abs:

- parameter: Stride_Width_Mean
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - concatenate: [Right_Stride_Width_Mean, Left_Stride_Width_Mean]
    - mean:
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m
      export: Stride_Width # for FA Running

# Cycle time # for FA Running
- parameter: Cycle_Time
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - divide: [Left_Stride_Length_Mean, left_stride_time]
      output: left
    - divide: [Right_Stride_Length_Mean, right_stride_time]
      output: right
    - concatenate: [left, right]
    - mean:

# Stance time # for FA Running
- parameter: Left_Stance_Time
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [LFS, LTO]
    
- parameter: Right_Stance_Time
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [RFS, RTO]

# Swing time # for FA Running
- parameter: Left_Swing_Time
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [LTO, LFS]

- parameter: Right_Swing_Time
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [RTO, RFS]

# Strides per minute
- parameter: Left_Strides_Per_Minute_Mean
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - divide: [60, left_stride_time]
    - mean:

- parameter: Right_Strides_Per_Minute_Mean
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - divide: [60, right_stride_time]
    - mean:

# Vertical pelvis movement
- parameter: Pelvis_Height_RANGE
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Hips_model, LFS, RFS]
      output: mask
    - max: mask.z => max
    - min: mask.z => min
    - subtract: [max, min]
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m

# Contact time
- parameter: Stance_Time_Mean_MEAN
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
  - eventDuration: [LFS, LTO]
    export: Left_Stance_Time_Mean
  - eventDuration: [RFS, RTO]
    export: Right_Stance_Time_Mean
  - mean: Left_Stance_Time_Mean => left_contact_time_mean
  - mean: Right_Stance_Time_Mean => right_contact_time_mean
  - concatenate: [left_contact_time_mean, right_contact_time_mean]
  - mean:

# Flight time
- parameter: Flight_Time_Mean_MEAN
  where:
    name: Run*
  steps:
  - eventDuration: [LTO, RFS]
    export: Flight_time_LTO_RFS
  - eventDuration: [RTO, LFS]
    export: Flight_time_RTO_LFS
  - mean: Flight_time_LTO_RFS => left_flight_time_mean
  - mean: Flight_time_RTO_LFS => right_flight_time_mean
  - concatenate: [left_flight_time_mean, right_flight_time_mean]
  - mean:

# Flight time/contact time ratio
- parameter: Swing_Contact_Ratio
  where:
    name: Run*
  steps:
  - divide: [Flight_Time_Mean_MEAN, Stance_Time_Mean_MEAN]

- parameter: Left_Swing_Contact_Ratio
  where:
    name: Run*
  steps:
  - divide: [Flight_time_LTO_RFS, Left_Stance_Time_Mean]

- parameter: Right_Swing_Contact_Ratio
  where:
    name: Run*
  steps:
  - divide: [Flight_time_RTO_LFS, Right_Stance_Time_Mean]

# Foot position at FS
- parameter: Left_HEEL_PELVIS_MEAN_X
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: LeftFoot_model => l_foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - segment: Hips_model => pelvis
      space: VirtualLab
    - subtract: [l_foot.y, pelvis.y]
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m
      output: heel_pelvis
    - import: heel_pelvis@LFS
      export: LHEEL_PELVIS_X 
    - mean: heel_pelvis@LFS

- parameter: Right_HEEL_PELVIS_MEAN_X
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: RightFoot_model => r_foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - segment: Hips_model => pelvis
      space: VirtualLab
    - subtract: [r_foot.y, pelvis.y]
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m
      output: heel_pelvis
    - import: heel_pelvis@RFS
      export: RHEEL_PELVIS_X 
    - mean: heel_pelvis@RFS

# Number of steps
- parameter: Cycle_Time_Count
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
  - eventDuration: [LFS, RFS]
  - count: $prev => l_to_r_count
  - eventDuration: [RFS, LFS]
  - count: $prev => r_to_l_count
  - add: [l_to_r_count, r_to_l_count]

# --- Pelvis angles ---
# at FS
- parameter: Left Pelvic Angles@LFS
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Left Pelvic Angles@LFS

- parameter: Right Pelvic Angles@RFS
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Right Pelvic Angles@RFS

# max during stance
- parameter: Left Pelvic Angles_MAX_stance
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Pelvic Angles, LFS, LTO]
      truncate: true
    - max:

- parameter: Right Pelvic Angles_MAX_stance
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Pelvic Angles, RFS, RTO]
      truncate: true
    - max:

# min during stance
- parameter: Left Pelvic Angles_MIN_stance
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Pelvic Angles, LFS, LTO]
      truncate: true
    - min:

- parameter: Right Pelvic Angles_MIN_stance
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Pelvic Angles, RFS, RTO]
      truncate: true
    - min:

# max during stride
- parameter: Left Pelvic Angles_MAX_stride
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Pelvic Angles, LFS, LFS]
      truncate: true
    - max:

- parameter: Right Pelvic Angles_MAX_stride
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Pelvic Angles, RFS, RFS]
      truncate: true
    - max:

# --- Hip angles ---
# at FS
- parameter: L_HIP_ANGLE@LFS
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Left Hip Angles@LFS

- parameter: R_HIP_ANGLE@RFS
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Right Hip Angles@RFS

# max during stance
- parameter: Left Hip Angles_MAX_stance
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Hip Angles, LFS, LTO]
      truncate: true
    - max:

- parameter: Right Hip Angles_MAX_stance
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Hip Angles, RFS, RTO]
      truncate: true
    - max:

# min during stance
- parameter: Left Hip Angles_MIN_stance
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Hip Angles, LFS, LTO]
      truncate: true
    - min:

- parameter: Right Hip Angles_MIN_stance
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Hip Angles, RFS, RTO]
      truncate: true
    - min:

# max during stride
- parameter: Left Hip Angles_MAX_stride
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Hip Angles, LFS, LFS]
      truncate: true
    - max:

- parameter: Right Hip Angles_MAX_stride
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Hip Angles, RFS, RFS]
      truncate: true
    - max:

# --- Knee angles ---
# at FS
- parameter: L_KNEE_ANG@LFS
  set: left
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Left Knee Angles@LFS

- parameter: R_KNEE_ANG@RFS
  set: right
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Right Knee Angles@RFS

# max during stance
- parameter: Left Knee Angles_MAX_stance
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Knee Angles, LFS, LTO]
      truncate: true
    - max:

- parameter: Right Knee Angles_MAX_stance
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Knee Angles, RFS, RTO]
      truncate: true
    - max:

# min during stance
- parameter: Left Knee Angles_MIN_stance
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Knee Angles, LFS, LTO]
      truncate: true
    - min:

- parameter: Right Knee Angles_MIN_stance
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Knee Angles, RFS, RTO]
      truncate: true
    - min:

# max during stride
- parameter: Left Knee Angles_MAX
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Knee Angles, LFS, LFS]
      truncate: true
    - max:

- parameter: Right Knee Angles_MAX
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Knee Angles, RFS, RFS]
      truncate: true
    - max:

# --- Ankle angles ---
# max during stance
- parameter: Left Ankle Angles_MAX_stance
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Ankle Angles, LFS, LTO]
      truncate: true
    - max:

- parameter: Right Ankle Angles_MAX_stance
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Ankle Angles, RFS, RTO]
      truncate: true
    - max:

# min during stance
- parameter: Left Ankle Angles_MIN_stance
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Ankle Angles, LFS, LTO]
      truncate: true
    - min:

- parameter: Right Ankle Angles_MIN_stance
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Ankle Angles, RFS, RTO]
      truncate: true
    - min:

# Foot wrt lab at footstrike
- parameter: L_FOOT_CONTACT_ANGLE@LFS
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Left Foot Contact Angle_shifted@LFS

- parameter: R_FOOT_CONTACT_ANGLE@RFS
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Right Foot Contact Angle_shifted@RFS

# Time between max stride angle and max knee flexion
- parameter: L_PEAK_KNEE_ANGLE_to_Left Stride Angle_max
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [L_peak_knee_flex, L_stride_angle_max]

- parameter: R_PEAK_KNEE_ANGLE_to_Right Stride Angle_max
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [R_peak_knee_flex, R_stride_angle_max]

# Time from max hip flexion to footstrike
- parameter: L_peak_hip_flexion_cycle_to_LFS_L_CYCLE
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [L_peak_hip_flex, LFS]

- parameter: R_peak_hip_flexion_cycle_to_RFS_R_CYCLE
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [R_peak_hip_flex, RFS]

# Time from max knee flexion to ankle cross
- parameter: L_PEAK_KNEE_ANGLE_to_L_Ankle_cross_L_CYCLE
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [L_peak_knee_flex, L_Ankle_cross]

- parameter: R_PEAK_KNEE_ANGLE_to_R_Ankle_cross_R_CYCLE
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [R_peak_knee_flex, R_Ankle_cross]

# Time from toe off to max hip flexion
- parameter: LTO_to_L_peak_hip_flexion_L_CYCLE
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [LTO, L_peak_hip_flex]

- parameter: RTO_to_R_peak_hip_flexion_R_CYCLE
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [RTO, R_peak_hip_flex]

# Time from toe off to hip flexion initiation
- parameter: LTO_to_L_peak_hip_extension_stride_L_CYCLE
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [LTO, L_peak_hip_extension_stride]

- parameter: RTO_to_R_peak_hip_extension_stride_R_CYCLE
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [RTO, R_peak_hip_extension_stride]

# Time from toe off to knee flexion initiation
- parameter: LTO_to_L_peak_knee_extension_stride_L_CYCLE
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [LTO, L_peak_knee_extension_stride]

- parameter: RTO_to_R_peak_knee_extension_stride_R_CYCLE
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventDuration: [RTO, R_peak_knee_extension_stride]

# Hip max extension per stride
- parameter: Left Hip Angles_MIN_stride
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Left Hip Angles, LFS, LFS]
      truncate: true
    - min:

- parameter: Right Hip Angles_MIN_stride
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - eventMask: [Right Hip Angles, RFS, RFS]
      truncate: true
    - min:

# Hip angular velocity at footstrike
- parameter: Left Hip Angles_Velocity
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - lowpass: Left Hip Angles
      extrapolate: 100
      order: 6
      cutoff: 12
    - velocity:

- parameter: Right Hip Angles_Velocity
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - lowpass: Right Hip Angles
      extrapolate: 100
      order: 6
      cutoff: 12
    - velocity:

- parameter: Left Hip Angles_Velocity@LFS
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Left Hip Angles_Velocity@LFS

- parameter: Right Hip Angles_Velocity@RFS
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Right Hip Angles_Velocity@RFS

# Hip angular velocity at midstance
- parameter: Left Hip Angles_Velocity@L_MID_STANCE
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Left Hip Angles_Velocity@L_MID_STANCE

- parameter: Right Hip Angles_Velocity@R_MID_STANCE
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Right Hip Angles_Velocity@R_MID_STANCE

# Hip angular velocity at toe off
- parameter: Left Hip Angles_Velocity@LTO
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Left Hip Angles_Velocity@LTO

- parameter: Right Hip Angles_Velocity@RTO
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Right Hip Angles_Velocity@RTO

# Hip angular velocity at ankle cross
- parameter: Left Hip Angles_Velocity@L_Ankle_cross
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Left Hip Angles_Velocity@L_Ankle_cross

- parameter: Right Hip Angles_Velocity@R_Ankle_cross
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Right Hip Angles_Velocity@R_Ankle_cross

# Hip flexion angular velocity (slope)
#/EXPRESSION=(METRIC::MAX::&::side& Hip Angles@&::side_short&_peak_hip_flexion_cycle_&::side_short&_CYCLE - METRIC::TOEOFF::&::side& Hip Angles@&::side_short&TO_&::side_short&_CYCLE) / METRIC::TIMING::&::side_short&TO_to_&::side_short&_peak_hip_flexion_&::side_short&_CYCLE
#(Left Hip Angles_MAX_stance - Left Hip Angles@LTO) / LTO_to_L_peak_hip_flexion_L_CYCLE
- parameter: Left_hip_ang_vel_slope
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - subtract: [Left Hip Angles_MAX_stance.x, Left Hip Angles.x@LTO]
    - divide: [$prev, LTO_to_L_peak_hip_flexion_L_CYCLE]

- parameter: Right_hip_ang_vel_slope
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - subtract: [Right Hip Angles_MAX_stance.x, Right Hip Angles.x@RTO]
    - divide: [$prev, RTO_to_R_peak_hip_flexion_R_CYCLE]

# Thigh angle at max stride angle
- parameter: Left Thigh Angles
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - jointAngle: [LeftUpLeg_model]
      space: VirtualLab
    - multiply: [$prev, [1, -1,-1]]

- parameter: Right Thigh Angles
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - jointAngle: [RightUpLeg_model]
      space: VirtualLab

- parameter: Left Thigh Angles@Left Stride Angle_max
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Left Thigh Angles@L_stride_angle_max
  
- parameter: Right Thigh Angles@Right Stride Angle_max
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Right Thigh Angles@R_stride_angle_max
  
  # Thigh angle at max knee flexion
- parameter: Left Thigh Angles@L_peak_knee_flexion
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Left Thigh Angles@L_peak_knee_flex

- parameter: Right Thigh Angles@R_peak_knee_flexion
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Right Thigh Angles@R_peak_knee_flex

# Knee to knee separation distance at mistance
- parameter: Knees_distance_left_stride@L_MID_STANCE
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: LeftLeg_model => l_knee
      space: VirtualLab
    - segment: RightLeg_model => r_knee
      space: VirtualLab
    - subtract: [r_knee, l_knee]
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m
      output: knee_dist
    - import: knee_dist@L_MID_STANCE

- parameter: Knees_distance_right_stride@R_MID_STANCE
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: LeftLeg_model => l_knee
      space: VirtualLab
    - segment: RightLeg_model => r_knee
      space: VirtualLab
    - subtract: [l_knee, r_knee]
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m
      output: knee_dist
    - import: knee_dist@R_MID_STANCE

# Knee flexion at toe off
- parameter: Left Knee Angles@LTO
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Left Knee Angles@LTO

- parameter: Right Knee Angles@RTO
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Right Knee Angles@RTO

# Knee flexion at ankle cross
- parameter: Left Knee Angles@L_Ankle_cross
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Left Knee Angles@L_Ankle_cross

- parameter: Right Knee Angles@R_Ankle_cross
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Right Knee Angles@R_Ankle_cross

# Knee angular velocity at footstrike
- parameter: Left Knee Angles_Velocity@LFS
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Left Knee Angles_Velocity@LFS
  
- parameter: Right Knee Angles_Velocity@RFS
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Right Knee Angles_Velocity@RFS
  
# Knee angular velocity at midstance
- parameter: Left Knee Angles_Velocity@L_MID_STANCE
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Left Knee Angles_Velocity@L_MID_STANCE
  
- parameter: Right Knee Angles_Velocity@R_MID_STANCE
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Right Knee Angles_Velocity@R_MID_STANCE
  
# Knee angular velocity at toe off
- parameter: Left Knee Angles_Velocity@LTO
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Left Knee Angles_Velocity@LTO
  
- parameter: Right Knee Angles_Velocity@RTO
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Right Knee Angles_Velocity@RTO
  
# Knee angular velocity at ankle cross
- parameter: Left Knee Angles_Velocity@L_Ankle_cross
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Left Knee Angles_Velocity@L_Ankle_cross
  
- parameter: Right Knee Angles_Velocity@R_Ankle_cross
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Right Knee Angles_Velocity@R_Ankle_cross

# Shank angular velocity at footstrike
- parameter: Left Shank wrt VLab Ang Vel@LFS
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - angularVelocity: [VirtualLabSegment, LeftLeg_model, VirtualLabSegment, LeftLeg_model]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: 10
      extrapolate: 5
    - multiply: [$prev, [1, -1, -1]]
      output: leg_ang_vel
    - import: leg_ang_vel@LFS

- parameter: Right Shank wrt VLab Ang Vel@RFS
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - angularVelocity: [VirtualLabSegment, RightLeg_model, VirtualLabSegment, RightLeg_model]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: 10
      extrapolate: 5
      output: leg_ang_vel
    - import: leg_ang_vel@RFS

# Shank angular velocity at ankle cross
- parameter: Left Shank wrt VLab Ang Vel@L_Ankle_cross
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - angularVelocity: [VirtualLabSegment, LeftLeg_model, VirtualLabSegment, LeftLeg_model]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: 10
      extrapolate: 5
    - multiply: [$prev, [1, -1, -1]]
      output: leg_ang_vel
    - import: leg_ang_vel@L_Ankle_cross

- parameter: Right Shank wrt VLab Ang Vel@R_Ankle_cross
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - angularVelocity: [VirtualLabSegment, RightLeg_model, VirtualLabSegment, RightLeg_model]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: 10
      extrapolate: 5
      output: leg_ang_vel
    - import: leg_ang_vel@R_Ankle_cross

# Ankle angular velocity at footstrike
- parameter: Left Ankle Angles_Velocity@LFS
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Left Ankle Angles_Velocity@LFS

- parameter: Right Ankle Angles_Velocity@RFS
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Right Ankle Angles_Velocity@RFS

# Ankle angular velocity at midstance
- parameter: Left Ankle Angles_Velocity@L_MID_STANCE
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Left Ankle Angles_Velocity@L_MID_STANCE

- parameter: Right Ankle Angles_Velocity@R_MID_STANCE
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Right Ankle Angles_Velocity@R_MID_STANCE

# Ankle angular velocity at toe off
- parameter: Left Ankle Angles_Velocity@LTO
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Left Ankle Angles_Velocity@LTO

- parameter: Right Ankle Angles_Velocity@RTO
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Right Ankle Angles_Velocity@RTO

# Ankle angular velocity at ankle cross
- parameter: Left Ankle Angles_Velocity@L_Ankle_cross
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Left Ankle Angles_Velocity@L_Ankle_cross

- parameter: Right Ankle Angles_Velocity@R_Ankle_cross
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - import: Right Ankle Angles_Velocity@R_Ankle_cross

# Foot distance to body COG at footstrike
# using pelvis origin instead of body COG
- parameter: Left_Foot_Distance_to_body_COG@LFS
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: LeftFoot_model => foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - segment: Hips_model => pelvis
      space: VirtualLab
    - subtract: [foot, pelvis]
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m
      output: foot_pelvis_dist
    - import: foot_pelvis_dist@LFS

- parameter: Right_Foot_Distance_to_body_COG@RFS
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
  steps:
    - segment: RightFoot_model => foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - segment: Hips_model => pelvis
      space: VirtualLab
    - subtract: [foot, pelvis]
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m
      output: foot_pelvis_dist
    - import: foot_pelvis_dist@RFS

# Kinetics
- parameter: Left GRF@Left_peak_landing_GRF
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
    force: left
  steps:
    - import: Left GRF@Left_peak_landing_GRF

- parameter: Left GRF@Left_peak_concentric_GRF
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
    force: left
  steps:
    - import: Left GRF@Left_peak_concentric_GRF

- parameter: Right GRF@Right_peak_landing_GRF
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
    force: right
  steps:
    - import: Right GRF@Right_peak_landing_GRF

- parameter: Right GRF@Right_peak_concentric_GRF
  where:
    name: ^(Gait|Run|Walk)*
    force: right
  steps:
    - import: Right GRF@Right_peak_concentric_GRF
```

---

### Template: Skeleton Mapping
_File: `templates/skeleton-mapping.calqulus.yaml`_

```yaml
# This template makes pipelines work with both skeleton models

- segment: Hips_model
  steps:
    - if: exists(Hips)
      then: Hips
      else: Pelvis

- segment: LeftUpLeg_model
  steps:
    - if: exists(LeftUpLeg)
      then: LeftUpLeg
      else: LeftFemur

- segment: RightUpLeg_model
  steps:
    - if: exists(RightUpLeg)
      then: RightUpLeg
      else: RightFemur

- segment: LeftLeg_model
  steps:
    - if: exists(LeftLeg)
      then: LeftLeg
      else: LeftShank

- segment: RightLeg_model
  steps:
    - if: exists(RightLeg)
      then: RightLeg
      else: RightShank

- segment: LeftFoot_model
  steps:
    - if: exists(LeftFoot)
      then: LeftFoot
      else: LeftHindfoot

- segment: RightFoot_model
  steps:
    - if: exists(RightFoot)
      then: RightFoot
      else: RightHindfoot

- segment: LeftToeBase_model
  steps:
    - if: exists(LeftToeBase)
      then: LeftToeBase
      else: LeftForefoot

- segment: RightToeBase_model
  steps:
    - if: exists(RightToeBase)
      then: RightToeBase
      else: RightForefoot

- segment: Spine2_model
  steps:
    - if: exists(Spine2)
      then: Spine2
      else: Thorax

- segment: LeftShoulder_model
  steps:
    - if: exists(LeftShoulder)
      then: LeftShoulder
      else: LeftClavicle

- segment: RightShoulder_model
  steps:
    - if: exists(RightShoulder)
      then: RightShoulder
      else: RightClavicle

- segment: LeftArm_model
  steps:
    - if: exists(LeftArm)
      then: LeftArm
      else: LeftHumerus

- segment: RightArm_model
  steps:
    - if: exists(RightArm)
      then: RightArm
      else: RightHumerus

- segment: LeftForeArm_model
  steps:
    - if: exists(LeftForearm)
      then: LeftForearm
      else: LeftForearm

- segment: RightForeArm_model
  steps:
    - if: exists(RightForearm)
      then: RightForearm
      else: RightForearm

- segment: LeftHand_model
  steps:
    - if: exists(LeftHand)
      then: LeftHand
      else: LeftMetacarpus

- segment: RightHand_model
  steps:
    - if: exists(RightHand)
      then: RightHand
      else: RightMetacarpus

- segment: Head_model
  steps:
    - if: exists(Head)
      then: Head
      else: Cranium
```

---

### Template: Timeseries
_File: `templates/timeseries.calqulus.yaml`_

```yaml
############
## SERIES ##
############

# Parameters needed for kinematics event detection in FA
- parameter: PelvisCGPos_vel
  steps:
    - vector: [Hips_model.x, Hips_model.y, Hips_model.z]
      space: VirtualLab
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m
      export: PelvisCGPos
    - velocity:

- parameter: LFT_DistEndAcc
  set: left
  steps:
    - segment: LeftToeBase_model
      space: VirtualLab
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m
    - lowpass:
      extrapolate: 100
      cutoff: 9
      export: LFT_DistEndPos
    - velocity:
    # - lowpass:
    #   extrapolate: 100
    #   cutoff: 16
      export: LFT_DistEndVel
    - velocity:

- parameter: RFT_DistEndAcc
  set: right
  steps:
    - segment: RightToeBase_model
      space: VirtualLab
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m
    - lowpass:
      extrapolate: 100
      cutoff: 9
      export: RFT_DistEndPos
    - velocity:
    # - lowpass:
    #   extrapolate: 100
    #   cutoff: 16
      export: RFT_DistEndVel
    - velocity:

# ####
# Timeseries used in all FA tasks and in Running, Cycling and Generic
# ####

# ----
# Kinematics ---
# ----
- parameter: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
  steps:
    - import: [15]

- parameter: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate
  steps:
    - import: [50]

# --- Pelvis ---

- parameter: Left Pelvic Angles
  set: left
  steps:
    - jointAngle: Hips_model
      space: VirtualLab
    - multiply: [$prev, [-1, 1, -1]]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
      extrapolate: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate

- parameter: Right Pelvic Angles
  set: right
  steps:
    - jointAngle: Hips_model
      space: VirtualLab
    - multiply: [$prev, [-1, -1, 1]]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
      extrapolate: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate

# --- Hips ---

- parameter: Left Hip Angles
  set: left
  steps:
    - jointAngle: [Hips_model, LeftUpLeg_model]
    - multiply: [$prev, [1, -1, -1]]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
      extrapolate: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate

- parameter: Right Hip Angles
  set: right
  steps:
    - jointAngle: [Hips_model, RightUpLeg_model]
    - multiply: [$prev, [1, 1, 1]]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
      extrapolate: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate

# --- Knee ---

- parameter: Left Knee Angles
  set: left
  steps:
    - jointAngle: [LeftUpLeg_model, LeftLeg_model]
    - multiply: [$prev, [-1, -1, -1]]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
      extrapolate: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate

- parameter: Right Knee Angles
  set: right
  steps:
    - jointAngle: [RightUpLeg_model, RightLeg_model]
    - multiply: [$prev, [-1, 1, 1]]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
      extrapolate: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate

# --- Ankle ---

- parameter: Left Ankle Angles
  set: left
  steps:
    - jointAngle: [LeftLeg_model, LeftFoot_model]
    - multiply: [$prev, [1, -1, -1]]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
      extrapolate: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate

- parameter: Right Ankle Angles
  set: right
  steps:
    - jointAngle: [RightLeg_model, RightFoot_model]
    - multiply: [$prev, [1, 1, 1]]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
      extrapolate: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate

- parameter: Left Foot Progression
  set: left
  steps:
    - jointAngle: LeftFoot_model
      space: VirtualLab
    - multiply: [$prev, [1, 1, -1]]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
      extrapolate: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate

- parameter: Right Foot Progression
  set: right
  steps:
    - jointAngle: RightFoot_model
      space: VirtualLab
    - multiply: [$prev, [1, 1, 1]]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
      extrapolate: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate

- parameter: Left Foot Pitch Angles
  set: left
  steps:
    - jointAngle: LeftFoot_model
      space: VirtualLab
    - multiply: [$prev, [1, 1, -1]]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
      extrapolate: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate

- parameter: Right Foot Pitch Angles
  set: right
  steps:
    - jointAngle: RightFoot_model
      space: VirtualLab
    - multiply: [$prev, [1, 1, 1]]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
      extrapolate: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate

# --- Upper body ---

# Thorax
- parameter: Left Thorax_Lab Angles
  set: left
  steps:
    - jointAngle: Spine2_model
      space: VirtualLab
    - multiply: [$prev, [-1,1,-1]]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
      extrapolate: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate

- parameter: Right Thorax_Lab Angles
  set: right
  steps:
    - jointAngle: Spine2_model
      space: VirtualLab
    - multiply: [$prev, [-1,-1,1]]
    - lowpass:
```
