```yaml
      cutoff: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
      extrapolate: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate

- parameter: Left Thorax Angles
  set: left
  steps:
    - jointAngle: [Hips_model, Spine2_model]
    - multiply: [$prev, [-1, 1, -1]]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
      extrapolate: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate

- parameter: Right Thorax Angles
  set: right
  steps:
    - jointAngle: [Hips_model, Spine2_model]
    - multiply: [$prev, [-1, -1, 1]]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
      extrapolate: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate

# Shoulder girdles
- parameter: Left Shoulder Girdle Angles
  set: left
  steps:
    - angle: [Spine2, LeftShoulder]
      unwrap: true
      rotationOrder: XYZ 
    - multiply: [$prev, [1, 1, -1]]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
      extrapolate: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate

- parameter: Right Shoulder Girdle Angles
  set: right
  steps:
    - angle: [Spine2, RightShoulder]
      unwrap: true
      rotationOrder: XYZ
    - multiply: [$prev, [1, -1, 1]]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
      extrapolate: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate      

# Shoulders
- parameter: Left Shoulder Angles
  set: left
  steps:
    - angle: [Spine2_model, LeftArm_model]
      unwrap: true
      rotationOrder: YXZ #based on Vandana,P. at al. Comparison of Glenohumeral Motion Using Different Rotation Sequences, J Biomech. 2011 Feb 24; 44(4): 700–705. 
    - multiply: [$prev, [1, -1, -1]]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
      extrapolate: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate

- parameter: Right Shoulder Angles
  set: right
  steps:
    - angle: [Spine2_model, RightArm_model]
      unwrap: true
      rotationOrder: YXZ
    - multiply: [$prev, [1, 1, 1]]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
      extrapolate: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate

- parameter: Left Shoulder Ang Vel
  set: left
  steps:
    - angularVelocity: [LeftShoulder_model, LeftArm_model, LeftShoulder_model, LeftArm_model]

- parameter: Right Shoulder Ang Vel
  set: right
  steps:
    - angularVelocity: [RightShoulder_model, RightArm_model, RightShoulder_model, RightArm_model]

# --- Arms ---

- parameter: Left Elbow Angles
  set: left
  steps:
    - angle: [LeftArm_model, LeftForeArm_model]
    - multiply: [$prev, [1, 1, -1]]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
      extrapolate: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate

- parameter: Right Elbow Angles
  set: right
  steps:
    - angle: [RightArm_model, RightForeArm_model]
    - multiply: [$prev, [1, 1, 1]]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
      extrapolate: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate

# --- Wrist ---

- parameter: Left Wrist Angles
  set: left
  steps:
    - angle: [LeftForeArm_model, LeftHand_model]
    - multiply: [$prev, [1, -1, 1]]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
      extrapolate: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate

- parameter: Right Wrist Angles
  set: right
  steps:
    - angle: [RightForeArm_model, RightHand_model]
    - multiply: [$prev, [1, 1, -1]]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
      extrapolate: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate

# --- Head ---

- parameter: Head Angles
  steps:
    - angle: [Head_model, Spine2_model]
    - lowpass:
      cutoff: KinematicsLowpassCutoffFq
      extrapolate: KinematicsLowpassExtrapolate
    - multiply: [$prev, [1, -1, -1]] # in cycling we use this convention

# COM distance to knee and ankle
# for now using pelvis COM instead of body COM
- parameter: Left_Knee_COM_distance
  set: left
  steps:
    - segment: LeftLeg_model => knee
      space: VirtualLab
    - segment: Hips_model => pelvis
      space: VirtualLab
    - subtract: [pelvis, knee]
    - convert: 
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: Right_Knee_COM_distance
  set: right
  steps:
    - segment: RightLeg_model => knee
      space: VirtualLab
    - segment: Hips_model => pelvis
      space: VirtualLab
    - subtract: [pelvis, knee]
    - convert: 
      from: mm
      to: m
    - multiply: [$prev,[-1,1,1]] #Invert right signal to make lateral movement positive

- parameter: Left_Ankle_COM_distance
  set: left
  steps:
    - segment: LeftFoot_model => foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - segment: Hips_model => pelvis
      space: VirtualLab
    - subtract: [pelvis, foot]
    - convert: 
      from: mm
      to: m

- parameter: Right_Ankle_COM_distance
  set: right
  steps:
    - segment: RightFoot_model => foot
      space: VirtualLab
    - segment: Hips_model => pelvis
      space: VirtualLab
    - subtract: [pelvis, foot]
    - convert: 
      from: mm
      to: m
    - multiply: [$prev,[-1,1,1]] #Invert right signal to make lateral movement positive

# ----
# Kinetics
# ----
- parameter: BodyWeightNewton
  steps:
    - multiply: [$bodyMass, 9.81]

# Dummy value to skip kinetics calculation
# For CMJ_B/DJ_B (bilateral): skip kinetics unless BOTH force plates exist
- parameter: skip_kinetics_calculation
  where:
    name: ^(CMJ_B|DJ_B)*
  steps:
    - if: (exists(ForcePlate1) && exists(ForcePlate2))
      then: [0]
      else: [1]

# For all other measurements (including CMJ_L, CMJ_R, DJ_L, DJ_R): don't skip kinetics
- parameter: skip_kinetics_calculation
  where:
    name: ^(?!(CMJ_B|DJ_B))*
  steps:
    - import: [0]

# Left
- parameter: Left GRF
  where:
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: LeftFootContact => foot
    - vector: [foot.fx, foot.fy, foot.fz]
      space: VirtualLab
    - divide: [$prev, BodyWeightNewton]
    - if: skip_kinetics_calculation == 0
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]

- parameter: Left Hip Moment
  where:
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
    - vector: [LeftHip.mx, LeftHip.my, LeftHip.mz]
    - divide: [$prev, $bodyMass]
    - multiply: [$prev,[-1,1,1]]
    - if: skip_kinetics_calculation == 0
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]

- parameter: Left Hip Power
  where:
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
    - vector: [LeftHip.p, LeftHip.p, LeftHip.p] #for compatibility with V3D power requires components
    - divide: [$prev, $bodyMass]
    - if: skip_kinetics_calculation == 0
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]

- parameter: Left Knee Moment
  where:
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
    - vector: [LeftKnee.mx, LeftKnee.my, LeftKnee.mz]
    - divide: [$prev, $bodyMass]
    - if: skip_kinetics_calculation == 0
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]

- parameter: Left Knee Power
  where:
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
    - vector: [LeftKnee.p, LeftKnee.p, LeftKnee.p] #for compatibility with V3D power requires components
    - divide: [$prev, $bodyMass]
    - if: skip_kinetics_calculation == 0
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]

- parameter: Left Ankle Moment
  where:
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
    - vector: [LeftAnkle.mx, LeftAnkle.my, LeftAnkle.mz]
    - divide: [$prev, $bodyMass]
    - multiply: [$prev,[-1,1,1]]
    - if: skip_kinetics_calculation == 0
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]

- parameter: Left Ankle Power
  where:
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
    - vector: [LeftAnkle.p, LeftAnkle.p, LeftAnkle.p] #for compatibility with V3D power requires components
    - divide: [$prev, $bodyMass]
    - if: skip_kinetics_calculation == 0
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]

- parameter: Left_COP
  where:
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: LeftFootContact => foot
    - vector: [foot.x, foot.y, foot.z]
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m
    - if: skip_kinetics_calculation == 0
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]

- parameter: Left_COP_COM_distance
  where:
    force: left
  set: left
  steps:
    - import: Left_COP
      space: VirtualLab
    - subtract: [PelvisCGPos, $prev]
    - if: skip_kinetics_calculation == 0
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]

# Right
- parameter: Right GRF
  where:
    force: right
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: RightFootContact => foot
    - vector: [foot.fx, foot.fy, foot.fz]
      space: VirtualLab
    - divide: [$prev, BodyWeightNewton]
    - multiply: [$prev, [-1,1,1]]
    - if: skip_kinetics_calculation == 0
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]

- parameter: Right Hip Moment
  where:
    force: right
  set: right
  steps:
    - vector: [RightHip.mx, RightHip.my, RightHip.mz]
    - divide: [$prev, $bodyMass]
    - multiply: [$prev,[-1,-1,-1]]
    - if: skip_kinetics_calculation == 0
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]

- parameter: Right Hip Power
  where:
    force: right
  set: right
  steps:
    - vector: [RightHip.p, RightHip.p, RightHip.p] #for compatibility with V3D power requires components
    - divide: [$prev, $bodyMass]
    - if: skip_kinetics_calculation == 0
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]

- parameter: Right Knee Moment
  where:
    force: right
  set: right
  steps:
    - vector: [RightKnee.mx, RightKnee.my, RightKnee.mz]
    - divide: [$prev, $bodyMass]
    - multiply: [$prev,[1,-1,-1]]
    - if: skip_kinetics_calculation == 0
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]

- parameter: Right Knee Power
  where:
    force: right
  set: right
  steps:
    - vector: [RightKnee.p, RightKnee.p, RightKnee.p] #for compatibility with V3D power requires components
    - divide: [$prev, $bodyMass]
    - if: skip_kinetics_calculation == 0
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]

- parameter: Right Ankle Moment
  where:
    force: right
  set: right
  steps:
    - vector: [RightAnkle.mx, RightAnkle.my, RightAnkle.mz]
    - divide: [$prev, $bodyMass]
    - multiply: [$prev,[-1,-1,-1]]
    - if: skip_kinetics_calculation == 0
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]

- parameter: Right Ankle Power
  where:
    force: right
  set: right
  steps:
    - vector: [RightAnkle.p, RightAnkle.p, RightAnkle.p] #for compatibility with V3D power requires components
    - divide: [$prev, $bodyMass]
    - if: skip_kinetics_calculation == 0
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]

- parameter: Right_COP
  where:
    force: right
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: RightFootContact => foot
    - vector: [foot.x, foot.y, foot.z]
    - convert:
      from: mm
      to: m
    - if: skip_kinetics_calculation == 0
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]

- parameter: Right_COP_COM_distance
  where:
    force: right
  set: right
  steps:
    - import: Right_COP
      space: VirtualLab
    - subtract: [PelvisCGPos, $prev]
    - multiply: [$prev,[-1,1,1]]
    - if: skip_kinetics_calculation == 0
      then: $prev
      else: [[]]
```

---
